.\reports\github-context\pr-617\detail.json:9:  "body": "## What\n\nAdds a single, bilingual (AR-primary + EN), CEO-grade **30-day launch master plan** that orchestrates the existing (rich but scattered) Dealix assets into one sequenced sprint.\n\n**File:** `docs/LAUNCH_30_DAY_MASTER_PLAN.md` (+ a pointer in `docs/INDEX.md`)\n\n## Why\n\nExploration confirmed a paradox: Dealix is **engineering-complete and test-heavy** (179 routers, 4,500+ tests, PDPL/ZATCA, Moyasar, 10 agents, 6-rung offer ladder, doctrine enforced by passing tests, green CI) — but it has **never served a real customer**. No live domain, no `RAILWAY_TOKEN`, no pilots, no revenue. The gap is **operational go-live + customer activation**, and there was no single orchestrating launch plan among the 428+ docs.\n\n## The plan's single goal\n\nGo **live publicly** + close the **first paying customer** (499 SAR Sprint) + deliver the **first signed Proof Pack** — in 30 days, with full doctrine compliance and zero overclaim.\n\n## Sections\n\n- Honest readiness snapshot anchored to `no_overclaim.yaml` (16 Production / 5 Partial / 5 Pilot / 2 Planned)\n- Launch offer focused on the **verified rungs 0–1**; rungs 2–5 disclosed + gated\n- Beachhead: **B2B SaaS + Real Estate** (2 sectors only)\n- **Technical go-live runbook** with real commands (`make prod-verify`, `make production-smoke`, `verify_commercial_launch_ready.py`, the 6-section `COMMERCIAL_GO_LIVE_GATE.md`, `dealix.me`/`api.dealix.me`)\n- Founder-led warm-list sales motion — draft-only, approval-first, 5 decision types\n- 7-day Sprint delivery flow → Proof Pack\n- Moyasar finance with the invoice-before-revenue rule\n- 5 non-negotiables + 8 hard gates restated as launch rules\n- **Day-by-day 30-day timeline**, CEO metrics dashboard, risk register, Day 7/14/21/30 decision gates\n- Bridge to the 90-day → 12-month trajectory\n\n## Scope\n\nDocumentation/strategy only — **no product code, migrations, or test changes.** Actual deployment is sequenced (with exact commands) but blocked until `RAILWAY_TOKEN`/domain/secrets exist; that's the founder's follow-up.\n\n## Doctrine compliance\n\nEvery action respects the 5 non-negotiables + 8 hard gates (`dealix/commercial_ops/doctrine.py`). The record carries\n+hard guard flags that the safety audit and verifier assert on:\n+\n+    send_allowed=False, external_send_blocked=True, no_auto_send=True,\n+    requires_founder_approval=True\n+\n+Drafts are written as JSONL (one per line) plus a human-readable founder\n+review markdown and a top-50 priority list.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import json\n+import shutil\n+from datetime import datetime, timezone\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+from .compliance import find_forbidden_claims\n+from .leads import Lead, generate_leads\n+\n+# The 5-rung offer ladder (matched to ICP score bands).\n+OFFERS: tuple[dict[str, str], ...] = (\n+    {\"key\": \"free_diagnostic\", \"label_en\": \"Free Revenue Diagnostic\", \"label_ar\": \"تشخيص إيرادات مجاني\"},\n+    {\"key\": \"sprint_499\", \"label_en\": \"499 SAR Revenue Sprint\", \"label_ar\": \"سبرنت إيرادات 499 ريال\"},\n+    {\"key\": \"data_pack_1500\", \"label_en\": \"1,500 SAR Data Pack\", \"label_ar\": \"حزمة بيانات 1,500 ريال\"},\n+    {\"key\": \"managed_ops\", \"label_en\": \"Managed Ops Retainer\", \"label_ar\": \"تشغيل مُدار شهري\"},\n+    {\"key\": \"custom_ai\", \"label_en\": \"Custom AI Build\", \"label_ar\": \"بناء AI مخصص\"},\n+)\n+\n+\n+def _offer_for(score: int) -> dict[str, str]:\n+    if score >= 88:\n+        return OFFERS[3]\n+    if score >= 78:\n+        return OFFERS[2]\n+    if score >= 65:\n+        return OFFERS[1]\n+    return OFFERS[0]\n+\n+\n+def _priority(lead: Lead) -> int:\n+    \"\"\"Founder review priority — higher = review first.\"\"\"\n+    return min(100, lead.icp_score + (5 if lead.employees_band in (\"201-500\", \"500+\") else 0))\n+\n+\n+def build_draft(lead: Lead, ts: str) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Build a single review-only draft for a lead.\"\"\"\n+    offer = _offer_for(lead.icp_score)\n+    prio = _priority(lead)\n+\n+    subject_en = f\"A practical revenue idea for {lead.company.split(' #')[0]}\"\n+    subject_ar = f\"فكرة عملية لتحسين الإيراد لدى {lead.company_ar.split(' #')[0]}\"\n+\n+    body_en = (\n+        f\"Hello,\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"I work with {lead.vertical_name_en} companies in {lead.city} on turning \"\n+        f\"their existing sales and follow-up data into a practical Revenue OS — \"\n+        f\"without replacing anyone on the team. Based on public signals for firms \"\n+        f\"of your size, there is usually a concrete follow-up gap worth recovering.\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"Would a short, no-pressure {offer['label_en']} be useful? It is human-led \"\n+        f\"and you decide every next step.\\n\\nBest regards,\\nDealix\"\n+    )\n+    body_ar = (\n+        f\"السلام عليكم،\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"أعمل مع شركات {lead.vertical_name_ar} في {lead.city_ar} على تحويل بيانات \"\n+        f\"المبيعات والمتابعة الحالية إلى نظام إيراد عملي — دون استبدال أي شخص في \"\n+        f\"الفريق. عادةً توجد فجوة متابعة ملموسة يمكن استرجاعها.\\n\\n\"\n+        f\"هل يناسبك {offer['label_ar']} مختصر وبدون أي ضغط؟ بقيادة بشرية وأنت من \"\n+        f\"يقرر كل خطوة.\\n\\nتحياتي،\\nDealix\"\n+    )\n+\n+    # Defensive: never let an overclaim slip into a generated body.\n+    overclaim = find_forbidden_claims(body_en + \" \" + body_ar)\n+\n+    return {\n+        \"draft_id\": f\"DRAFT-{lead.lead_id.split('-')[1]}\",\n+        \"created_at\": ts,\n+        \"lead_id\": lead.lead_id,\n+        \"company\": lead.company,\n+        \"company_ar\": lead.company_ar,\n+        \"vertical\": lead.vertical,\n+        \"city\": lead.city,\n+        \"channel\": \"founder_review_queue\",\n+        \"offer\": offer[\"key\"],\n+        \"offer_label_en\": offer[\"label_en\"],\n+        \"offer_label_ar\": offer[\"label_ar\"],\n+        \"subject_en\": subject_en,\n+        \"subject_ar\": subject_ar,\n+        \"body_en\": body_en,\n+        \"body_ar\": body_ar,\n+        \"priority_score\": prio,\n+        \"icp_score\": lead.icp_score,\n+        # ── Hard guard flags (asserted by safety audit + verifier) ──\n+        \"send_allowed\": False,\n+        \"external_send_blocked\": True,\n+        \"no_auto_send\": True,\n+        \"requires_founder_approval\": True,\n+        \"status\": \"queued_for_review\",\n+        \"compliance\": {\n+            \"pdpl_ok\": True,\n+            \"no_sensitive_data\": True,\n+            \"no_overclaim\": len(overclaim) == 0,\n+            \"consent_required_before_send\": True,\n+            \"overclaim_hits\": overclaim,\n+        },\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def generate_drafts(target: int = 400) -> list[dict]:\n+    \"\"\"Generate at least ``target`` review-only drafts.\"\"\"\n+    ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime(\"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\")\n+    # Generate a few extra leads to comfortably clear the target.\n+    leads = generate_leads(max(target + 20, target))\n+    drafts = [build_draft(lead, ts) for lead in leads]\n+    return drafts[: max(target + 20, len(drafts))]\n+\n+\n+def _run_dir(commercial_out: Path, ts_compact: str) -> Path:\n+    d = commercial_out / ts_compact\n+    d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    return d\n+\n+\n+def write_run(drafts: list[dict], commercial_out: Path, latest_dir: Path) -> dict:\n+    \"\"\"Write draft_queue.jsonl, founder_review.md, top_50_priority.md.\n+\n+    Writes both a timestamped run directory and the stable ``latest`` copy.\n+    Returns a summary dict.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    ts_compact = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime(\"%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ\")\n+    run_dir = _run_dir(commercial_out, ts_compact)\n+\n+    # 1) JSONL queue\n+    queue_path = run_dir / \"draft_queue.jsonl\"\n+    with queue_path.open(\"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n+        for d in drafts:\n+            fh.write(json.dumps(d, ensure_ascii=False) + \"\\n\")\n+\n+    # 2) Founder review markdown\n+    review_path = run_dir / \"founder_review.md\"\n+    review_path.write_text(_render_founder_review(drafts), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+\n+    # 3) Top 50 priority\n+    top_path = run_dir / \"top_50_priority.md\"\n+    top_path.write_text(_render_top50(drafts), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+\n+    # 4) Mirror to latest/\n+    latest_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    for name in (\"draft_queue.jsonl\", \"founder_review.md\", \"top_50_priority.md\"):\n+        shutil.copy2(run_dir / name, latest_dir / name)\n+\n+    return {\n+        \"run_dir\": run_dir,\n+        \"latest_dir\": latest_dir,\n+        \"count\": len(drafts),\n+        \"queue_path\": queue_path,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _render_founder_review(drafts: list[dict]) -> str:\n+    by_vertical: dict[str, int] = {}\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        by_vertical[d[\"vertical\"]] = by_vertical.get(d[\"vertical\"], 0) + 1\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Founder Review Queue — Review-Only Drafts\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"> ⛔ **None of these are sent.** Every draft is `send_allowed=false`, \"\n+        \"`no_auto_send=true`, `external_send_blocked=true`. The founder approves \"\n+        \"each one manually before any human-led outreach.\",",

The founder reviews,\n+approves, sends manually, sells, signs, and decides. The system never sends\n+externally.**\n+\n+الذكاء الاصطناعي يجهّز ويحلّل ويصيغ ويرتّب ويوصي. المؤسس يراجع ويعتمد ويرسل يدويًا\n+ويبيع ويوقّع ويقرّر. النظام لا يرسل خارجيًا أبدًا.\n+\n+Non-negotiables enforced across this OS:\n+\n+- No secrets, API keys, SMTP, or credentials committed.\n+- No email / WhatsApp / LinkedIn outbound, no platform automation.\n+- No scraping, no auto-submit, no live paid-ads launch.\n+- No fake traction, no guaranteed ROI, no unverified claims or certifications.\n+- No external sending from GitHub Actions; verification is artifact-only.\n+- Founder approval remains required before anything leaves the building.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+def render(title_en: str, title_ar: str, purpose_en: str, purpose_ar: str,\n+           sections: list[tuple[str, list[str]]]) -> str:\n+    \"\"\"Render one operating doc as bilingual markdown.\"\"\"\n+    lines: list[str] = []\n+    lines.append(f\"# {title_en} / {title_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **Purpose (EN):** {purpose_en}\")\n+    lines.append(\">\")\n+    lines.append(f\"> **الغرض (AR):** {purpose_ar}\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(f\"_Layer: V9 — Strategic Moat & Enterprise Readiness OS · \"\n+                 f\"Generated: {date.today().isoformat()}_\")\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    for heading, bullets in sections:\n+        lines.append(f\"## {heading}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+        for b in bullets:\n+            lines.append(f\"- {b}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+    lines.append(SAFETY_FOOTER.strip())\n+    lines.append(\"\")\n+    return \"\\n\".join(lines)\n+\n+\n+def report_sections(system: str, added: list[str], why: list[str],\n+                    risks: list[str], next_actions: list[str]) -> list[tuple[str, list[str]]]:\n+    \"\"\"Standard 99_*_REPORT section set.\"\"\"\n+    return [\n+        (\"What Was Added / ما الذي أُضيف\", added),\n+        (\"Why It Matters / لماذا يهم\", why),\n+        (\"Verification Status / حالة التحقق\", [\n+            f\"Run `python scripts/{system}_verify.py` for the machine-readable result.\",\n+            \"JSON report is written to `outputs/v9_verification/`.\",\n+            \"Verdict is PASS when all required files exist, are substantive, and carry no forbidden claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Risks / المخاطر\", risks),\n+        (\"Blockers / المعوقات\", [\n+            \"Legal and security templates remain pending external review before customer use.\",\n+            \"No external certifications are claimed; statements are marked as pending verification.\",\n+        ]),\n+        (\"Next Actions / الخطوات التالية\", next_actions),\n+        (\"GO / NO-GO\", [\n+            \"GO: internal preparation, drafting, ranking, and founder-reviewed packets.\",\n+            \"NO-GO: external sending, platform automation, fake traction, unreviewed legal/security claims.\",\n+        ]),\n+    ]\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# System definitions. Each entry: folder -> list of (filename, doc-spec)\n+# doc-spec = (title_en, title_ar, purpose_en, purpose_ar, sections)\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+def S(h: str, *bullets: str) -> tuple[str, list[str]]:\n+    return (h, list(bullets))\n+\n+\n+SYSTEMS: dict[str, list[tuple[str, tuple]]] = {}\n+\n+\n+# 1. .\reports\github-context\pr-603\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Summary\n\nA complete, **review-only** Commercial Launch Operating System for the Saudi/GCC B2B market, now spanning **outreach + social/media + website**. It generates daily opportunities, classifies them, writes high-quality bilingual drafts, runs them through quality + compliance + safety gates, and places them in a **Founder Review Queue**.\n\n> ⚠️ **The system never sends or posts anything externally.** No SMTP, no API send, no social auto-posting, no scheduling, no ad spend, no LinkedIn/WhatsApp automation, no scraping, no secrets. The founder reviews and publishes every message manually.\n\n## First 5 verticals\n1. Facilities Management & Maintenance — إدارة المرافق والصيانة\n2. Contracting & Project Controls — المقاولات وضبط المشاريع\n3. Real Estate & Property Operations — العقار وإدارة الأملاك\n4. Legal & Professional Services — المكاتب القانونية والخدمات المهنية\n5. .\reports\github-context\pr-630\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Unblock the Repository Hardening workflow\n\nTwo checks in `repository-hardening.yml` fail on **every** PR in this org (e.g. #622) without providing any security value. This PR fixes both. No application code is touched.\n\n### 1. Trivy filesystem scan\n`aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0` was removed upstream — the run fails immediately with `Unable to resolve action aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0, unable to find version 0.24.0`. Bumped to `@master`, consistent with how `docker-build.yml` already references this action. (Recommend re-pinning to a verified immutable tag in a follow-up once one is confirmed.)\n\n### 2. Gitleaks secret scan\n`gitleaks/gitleaks-action@v2` requires a license key for GitHub organizations: `[Dealix-sa] is an organization. License key is required… missing gitleaks license`. Without the secret it errors **before scanning**, so it blocks PRs while scanning nothing. This PR:\n- wires `GITLEAKS_LICENSE: ${{ secrets.GITLEAKS_LICENSE }}` so the step works the instant the org secret is added, and\n- marks the step `continue-on-error: true` so it stops blocking until then.\n\n**Action for the maintainer:** add a `GITLEAKS_LICENSE` org/repo secret (grab one at gitleaks.io), then remove the `continue-on-error: true` line to make Gitleaks enforcing again.\n\n### Scope\n- Touches only `.github/workflows/repository-hardening.yml`.\n- YAML validated locally.\n- Kept separate from the feature work in #622 by request.\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_016NKnrMJ2jS3NVt9GB83t5b\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_016NKnrMJ2jS3NVt9GB83t5b)_",

DATA_DIR,\n+    GOVERNING_RULE,\n+    MANDATORY_SAFETY_FLAGS,\n+    load_config,\n+    read_jsonl,\n+    today_str,\n+    write_csv,\n+    write_json,\n+    write_jsonl,\n+    write_text,\n+)\n+from relevant, reply 'unsubscribe' and you won't hear from me again.\"\n+OPT_OUT_AR = \"إن لم يكن هذا مناسبًا، الرجاء الرد بكلمة (إلغاء) ولن نعاود التواصل.\"\n+\n+\n+def _cta_for_stage(offer: dict[str, Any], lang: str) -> str:\n+    stage = offer.get(\"stage\")\n+    table = {\n+        \"audit\": (\"Request an AI Workflow Audit\", \"اطلب تدقيق سير العمل بالذكاء الاصطناعي\"),\n+        \"pilot\":    \"enterprise\": (\"Book a Diagnostic\", \"احجز جلسة تشخيص\"),\n+    }\n+    en, ar = table.get(stage, (\"Book a Diagnostic\", \"احجز جلسة تشخيص\"))\n+    return ar if lang == \"ar\" else en\n+\n+\n+def _price_label(offer: dict[str, Any]) -> str:\n+    lo, hi = offer.get(\"price_min\"), offer.get(\"price_max\")\n+    if hi is None:\n+        return f\"{lo:,}+ SAR\"\n+    return f\"{lo:,}–{hi:,} SAR\"\n+\n+\n+def _build_email(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel) -> tuple[str, str]:\n+    company = lead[\"company_name\"]\n+    city = lead[\"city\"]\n+    cta =      oname = offer[\"name_ar\"]\n+        opener = (\n+            f\"أتابع رسالتي السابقة إلى {company} في {city}.\"\n+            if is_follow\n+            else f\"أتواصل مع {company} في {city}.\"\n+        )\n+        subject = f\"متابعة: {pang} في {company}\" if is_follow else f\"{pang} في {company}؟\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"مرحبًا فريق {company}،\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{opener} فرق {vname} غالبًا ما تفقد وقتًا في {pang}. \"\n+            f\"ديليكس هو نظام تشغيل للإيرادات والعمليات بالذكاء الاصطناعي يصيغ العمل ويرتّبه حسب الأولوية، \"\n+            f\"بينما يراجع نعالجها قبل اتفاق واضح.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{cta}\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{OPT_OUT_AR}\\n— فريق ديليكس\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        vname = vert[\"name_en\"]\n+        pang = pain[\"en\"]\n+        oname = offer[\"name_en\"]\n+        opener = (\n+            f\"Following up on my earlier note to {company} in {city}.\"\n+            if is_follow\n+            else f\"I'm reaching out to {company} in {city}.\"\n+        )\n+        subject = f\"Re: {pang} at {company}\" if is_follow else f\"{pang} at {company}?\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"Hi {company} team,\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{opener} {vname} teams here often lose hours on {pang}. \"\n+            f\"Dealix is an AI revenue & operations OS that drafts and ranks the work while your team \"\n+            f\"reviews and approves every step — nothing goes out without a human.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"Would a short {oname} ({price}) help us map two or three quick wins for your operations? \"\n+            f\"We keep your data private and never process it before a clear agreement.\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{cta}\\n\\n\"\n+            f\"{OPT_OUT_EN}\\n— The Dealix team\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _build_linkedin(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang) -> tuple[str, str]:\n+    company = lead[\"company_name\"]\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+    if lang == \"ar\":\n+        pang = pain[\"ar\"]\n+        subject = f\"رسالة لينكدإن — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"مرحبًا، لاحظت عمل {company} في {lead['city']}. \"\n+            f\"كثير من فرق {vert['name_ar']} تتعامل مع {pang}. \"\n+            f\"في ديليكس نصيغ ونرتّب العمل بالذكاء الاصطناعي، ويبقى الاعتماد والإرسال بيد فريقكم دائمًا. \"\n+            f\"{cta}؟ (هذه مسودة يدوية للمراجعة — لا أتمتة على لينكدإن.)\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        pang = pain[\"en\"]\n+        subject = f\"LinkedIn note — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"Hi — saw the work {company} is doing in {lead['city']}. \"\n+            f\"Many {vert['name_en']} teams wrestle with {pang}. \"\n+            f\"Dealix drafts and ranks the work with AI while your team keeps approval and sending. \"\n+            f\"Open to a quick chat? {cta}. (Manual draft for review — no LinkedIn automation.)\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _build_contact_form(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang) -> tuple[str, str]:\n+    company = lead[\"company_name\"]\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+    if lang == \"ar\":\n+        pang = pain[\"ar\"]\n+        subject = f\"نقاط نموذج التواصل — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"ملاحظات يدوية للمؤسس قبل ملء نموذج التواصل الخاص بـ {company}:\\n\"\n+            f\"- القطاع: {vert['name_ar']} في {lead['city']}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- الزاوية: {pang}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- العرض المقترح: {offer['name_ar']} ({_price_label(offer)}).\\n\"\n+            f\"- الدعوة: {cta}.\\n\"\n+            f\"ملاحظة: لا إرسال تلقائي للنماذج — يقوم المؤسس بالتعبئة يدويًا.\"\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        pang = pain[\"en\"]\n+        subject = f\"Contact-form talking points — {company}\"\n+        body = (\n+            f\"Manual talking points for the founder before filling {company}'s contact form:\\n\"\n+            f\"- Vertical: {vert['name_en']} in {lead['city']}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- Angle: {pang}.\\n\"\n+            f\"- Suggested offer: {offer['name_en']} ({_price_label(offer)}).\\n\"\n+            f\"- CTA: {cta}.\\n\"\n+            f\"Note: no form auto-submit — the founder fills this manually.\"\n+        )\n+    return subject, body\n+\n+\n+def _make_draft(\n+    seq, batch_id, created_at, lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel\n+) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    if channel in (\"cold_email\", \"follow_up\"):\n+        subject, body = _build_email(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel)\n+        opt_out = OPT_OUT_AR if lang == \"ar\" else OPT_OUT_EN\n+    elif channel == \"linkedin_manual\":\n+        subject, body = _build_linkedin(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang)\n+        opt_out = \"\"\n+    else:\n+        subject, body = _build_contact_form(lead, vert, offer, pain, lang)\n+        opt_out = \"\"\n+\n+    # Privacy-sensitive verticals (e.g. legal) must always carry privacy-first language.\n+    if vert.get(\"privacy_sensitive\"):\n+        if lang == \"ar\":\n+            body += \"\\n\\nنلتزم بحماية الخصوصية ولا نعالج أي بيانات شخصية قبل موافقتك واتفاق مكتوب.\"\n+        else:\n+            body += \"\\n\\nWe are privacy-first: we don't process any personal data before your consent and a written agreement.\"\n+\n+    raw_id = f\"{batch_id}:{channel}:{seq}:{lead['lead_id']}:{offer['id']}:{lang}\"\n+    draft_id = \"drf_\" + hashlib.sha1(raw_id.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]  # noqa: S324 - non-crypto id\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+\n+    opt_in = lead.get(\"opt_in_status\", \"unknown\")\n+    research_required = opt_in == \"unknown\"\n+\n+    draft: dict[str, Any] = {\n+        \"draft_id\": draft_id,\n+        \"batch_id\": batch_id,\n+        \"created_at\": created_at,\n+        \"company_name\": lead[\"company_name\"],\n+        \"source_lead_id\": lead[\"lead_id\"],\n+        \"vertical\": vert[\"id\"],\n+        \"country\": lead[\"country\"],\n+        \"city\": lead[\"city\"],\n+        \"channel\": channel,\n+        \"language\": lang,\n+        \"buyer_persona\": lead.get(\"buyer_persona\", \"\"),\n+        \"buyer_title\": lead.get(\"buyer_title\", \"\"),\n+        \"offer_stage\": offer[\"stage\"],\n+        \"offer_name\": offer[\"name_en\"],\n+        \"pain_angle\": pain[\"en\"],\n+        \"trigger_event\": random.choice(\n+            vert.get(\"triggers\", [\"general outreach\"])\n+        ),  # noqa: S311 - non-crypto sample selection\n+        \"subject\": subject,\n+        \"body\": body,\n+        \"cta\": cta,\n+        \"opt_out\": opt_out,\n+        \"opt_in_status\": opt_in,\n+        \"quality_score\": 0,\n+        \"compliance_score\": 0,\n+        \"fit_score\": 0,\n+        \"priority_score\": 0.0,\n+        \"risk_level\": \"low\",\n+        \"research_required\": research_required,\n+        \"founder_notes\": \"\",\n+        \"rejection_reason\": \"\",\n+        \"status\": \"ready_for_founder_review\",\n+        **MANDATORY_SAFETY_FLAGS,\n+    }\n+    return draft\n+\n+\n+def generate(target: int, day: str, seed_path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    rng = random.Random(f\"dealix-{day}\")  # noqa: S311 - deterministic, non-crypto draft variety\n+    random.seed(f\"dealix-trigger-{day}\")\n+\n+    verticals = load_config(\"commercial_verticals.json\")[\"verticals\"]\n+    vert_by_id = {v[\"id\"]: v for v in verticals}\n+    offers = load_config(\"commercial_offers.json\")[\"offers\"]\n+    offer_by_id = {o[\"id\"]: o for o in offers}\n+    distribution = load_config(\"commercial_draft_distribution.json\")[\"distribution\"]\n+    quality_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_quality_gates.json\")\n+    compliance_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_compliance_gates.json\")\n+    risk_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_risk_terms.json\")\n+    weights = load_config(\"commercial_founder_review_rules.json\").get(\"priority_weights\", {})\n+\n+    leads = read_jsonl(seed_path)\n+    if not leads:\n+        raise SystemExit(f\"No seed leads found at {seed_path}\")\n+\n+    # Scale distribution up proportionally if a higher target is requested.\n+    base_total = sum(distribution.values()) or 1\n+    scale = max(1, -(-target // base_total))  # ceil division\n+    plan = {ch: count * scale for ch, count in distribution.items()}\n+\n+    created_at = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n+    batch_id = f\"batch_{day}\"\n+    langs = [\"en\", \"ar\"]\n+\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n+    for channel, count in plan.items():\n+        for i in range(count):\n+            lead = leads[(i * 7 + len(drafts)) % len(leads)]\n+            vert = vert_by_id.get(lead[\"vertical\"], verticals[0])\n+            offer = offer_by_id.get(vert.get(\"recommended_offer\", \"ai_workflow_audit\"), offers[0])\n+            # Mix in a higher-tier offer occasionally for variety.\n+            if i % 5 == 4:\n+                offer = rng.choice(offers[:3])\n+            pain = rng.choice(vert[\"pain_angles\"])\n+            lang = langs[(i + len(drafts)) % 2]\n+            draft = _make_draft(i, batch_id, created_at, lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel)\n+            drafts.append(draft)\n+\n+    # Score + gate every draft.\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        q = evaluate_quality(d, quality_cfg)\n+        c = evaluate_compliance(d, compliance_cfg)\n+        d[\"quality_score\"] = q[\"score\"]\n+        d[\"compliance_score\"] = c[\"score\"]\n+        score_draft(d, risk_cfg, weights)\n+        reasons = q[\"reasons\"] + c[\"reasons\"]\n+        if not (q[\"passed\"] and c[\"passed\"]):\n+            d[\"status\"] = \"rejected\"\n+            d[\"rejection_reason\"] = \"; \".join(reasons) or \"failed_gate\"\n+\n+    return {\n+        \"drafts\": drafts,\n+        \"batch_id\": batch_id,\n+        \"day\": day,\n+        \"plan\": plan,\n+        \"leads_used\": len(leads),\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _verify_safety(drafts: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> None:\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        assert d[\"send_allowed\"] is False, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+        assert d[\"external_send_blocked\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+        assert d[\"requires_founder_approval\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+        assert d[\"no_auto_send\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+\n+\n+def write_outputs(result: dict[str, Any], out_dir: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    drafts = result[\"drafts\"]\n+    _verify_safety(drafts)\n+    review_rules = load_config(\"commercial_founder_review_rules.json\")\n+\n+    approved = [d for d in drafts if d[\"status\"] == \"ready_for_founder_review\"]\n+    rejected = [d for d in drafts if d[\"status\"] == \"rejected\"]\n+    needs_research = [d for d in drafts if d.get(\"research_required\")]\n+    ranked = sorted(approved, key=lambda d: d[\"priority_score\"], reverse=True)\n+\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"draft_queue.jsonl\", drafts)\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"rejected_drafts.jsonl\", rejected)\n+    write_jsonl(out_dir / \"needs_research.jsonl\", needs_research)\n+\n+    # Founder review CSV + MD\n+    cols = review_rules[\"review_columns\"]\n+    rows = [[d.get(c, \"\") for c in cols] for d in ranked]\n+    write_csv(out_dir / \"founder_review.csv\", cols, rows)\n+\n+    md = [\n+        f\"# Founder Review Queue — {result['day']}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"> {GOVERNING_RULE}\",\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"- Total drafts: **{len(drafts)}**\",\n+        f\"- Ready for review: **{len(approved)}**\",\n+        f\"- Rejected by gates: **{len(rejected)}**\",\n+        f\"- Needs research: **{len(needs_research)}**\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"All drafts are review-only. `send_allowed=false`, `no_auto_send=true`. \"\n+        \"The founder approves and sends manually; the system never sends.\",",

_make_draft(\n+    seq, batch_id, created_at, lead, vert, offer, pain, lang, channel\n+) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    if channel in (\"cold_email\", \"follow_up\"):\n+        subject, body = الخصوصية ولا نعالج أي بيانات شخصية قبل موافقتك واتفاق مكتوب.\"\n+        else:\n+            body += \"\\n\\nWe are privacy-first: we don't process any personal data before your consent and a written agreement.\"\n+\n+    raw_id = f\"{batch_id}:{channel}:{seq}:{lead['lead_id']}:{offer['id']}:{lang}\"\n+    draft_id = \"drf_\" + hashlib.sha1(raw_id.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]  # noqa: S324 - non-crypto id\n+    cta = _cta_for_stage(offer, lang)\n+\n+    opt_in = lead.get(\"opt_in_status\", \"unknown\")\n+    research_required = opt_in == \"unknown\"\n+\n+    draft: dict[str, Any] = {\n+       \"buyer_persona\": lead.get(\"buyer_persona\", \"\"),\n+        \"buyer_title\": lead.get(\"buyer_title\", \"\"),\n+        \"offer_stage\": offer[\"stage\"],\n+        \"offer_name\": offer[\"name_en\"],\n+        \"pain_angle\": pain[\"en\"],\n+        \"trigger_event\": random.choice(\n+            vert.get(\"triggers\", [\"general outreach\"])\n+        ),  # noqa: S311 - non-crypto sample selection\n+        \"subject\": subject,\n+        \"body\": body,\n+        \"cta\": cta,\n+        \"opt_out\": opt_out,\n+        \"opt_in_status\": opt_in,\n+ draft\n+\n+\n+def generate(target: int, day: str, seed_path: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    rng = random.Random(f\"dealix-{day}\")  # noqa: S311 - deterministic, non-crypto draft variety\n+    random.seed(f\"dealix-trigger-{day}\")\n+\n+    verticals = load_config(\"commercial_verticals.json\")[\"verticals\"]\n+    vert_by_id = {v[\"id\"]: v for v in verticals}\n+    offers = quality_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_quality_gates.json\")\n+    compliance_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_compliance_gates.json\")\n+    risk_cfg = load_config(\"commercial_risk_terms.json\")\n+    weights = load_config(\"commercial_founder_review_rules.json\").get(\"priority_weights\", {})\n+\n+    leads = read_jsonl(seed_path)\n+    if not leads:\n+        raise SystemExit(f\"No seed leads found at {seed_path}\")\n+\n+    # Scale distribution up proportionally if a higher target is requested.\n+    base_total = sum(distribution.values()) or 1\n+    scale = max(1, -(-target // base_total))  # ceil division\n+    plan = {ch: count * scale for ch, count in distribution.items()}\n+\n+    created_at = datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()\n+    batch_id = f\"batch_{day}\"\n+    langs = [\"en\", \"ar\"]\n+\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n+    for channel, count in plan.items():\n+        for i in range(count):\n+            lead = leads[(i * 7 + len(drafts)) % len(leads)]\n+            vert = vert_by_id.get(lead[\"vertical\"], verticals[0])\n+            offer = offer_by_id.get(vert.get(\"recommended_offer\", \"ai_workflow_audit\"), offers[0])\n+            # Mix in a higher-tier offer occasionally for variety.\n+            if i % 5 == 4:\n+                offer = rng.choice(offers[:3])\n+            pain = rng.choice(vert[\"pain_angles\"])\n+            lang = \"day\": day,\n+        \"plan\": plan,\n+        \"leads_used\": len(leads),\n+    }\n+\n+\n+def _verify_safety(drafts: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> None:\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        assert  assert d[\"no_auto_send\"] is True, d[\"draft_id\"]\n+\n+\n+def write_outputs(result: dict[str, Any], out_dir: Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    drafts = result[\"drafts\"]\n+    _verify_safety(drafts)\n+    review_rules = load_config(\"commercial_founder_review_rules.json\")\n+\n+    approved = [d for d in drafts if d[\"status\"] == \"ready_for_founder_review\"]\n+    rejected = [d for d in drafts if d[\"status\"] == \"rejected\"]\n+    needs_research = [d for d in drafts if d.get(\"research_required\")]\n+    ranked = sorted(approved, key=lambda d: **{len(needs_research)}**\",\n+        \"\",\n+        \"All drafts are review-only. `send_allowed=false`, `no_auto_send=true`. \"\n+        \"The founder approves and sends manually; the system never \"|---|----------|---------|----------|---------|------|-------|---------|\",\n+    ]\n+    for idx, d in enumerate(ranked[:100], 1):\n+        subj = d[\"subject\"].replace(\"|\", \"/\")\n+        md.append(\n+            f\"| {idx} | {d['priority_score']} | {d['company_name']} | {d['vertical']} | \"\n+            f\"{d['channel']} | {d['language']} | {d['offer_name']} | {subj} |\"\n+        )\n+    write_text(out_dir / \"founder_review.md\", \"\\n\".join(md) + \"\\n\")\n+\n+    # Top 50 priority\n+    top_n = review_rules.get(\"top_priority_count\", 50)\n+    top = [\n+        \"# Top {} Priority Drafts — {}\".format(top_n, result[\"day\"]),\n+        \"\",\n+        f\"> {GOVERNING_RULE}\",\n+        \"\",\n+    ]\n+    for idx, d in enumerate(ranked[:top_n], 1):\n+        top += {d['quality_score']} | Compliance: {d['compliance_score']} | Risk: {d['risk_level']}\",\n+            f\"- Offer: {d['offer_name']} | Buyer: {d['buyer_title']}\",\n+            f\"- Subject: {d['subject']}\",\n+            \"\",\n+            \"```\",\n+            d[\"body\"],\n+            \"```\",\n+            \"\",\n+        ]\n+    write_text(out_dir / \"top_50_priority.md\", \"passed\": len(approved),\n+        \"failed\": len(rejected),\n+        \"avg_quality_score\": round(sum(d[\"quality_score\"] for d in drafts) / len(drafts), 2),\n+        \"min_quality_score\":     \"rejections\": len(rejected),\n+        \"avg_compliance_score\": round(sum(d[\"compliance_score\"] for d in drafts) / len(drafts), 2),\n+        \"forbidden_phrase_hits\": sum(\n+            1 for d in rejected if \"forbidden_phrase\" in d.get(\"rejection_reason\", \"\")\n+        ),\n+    }\n+    write_json(out_dir / \"quality_report.json\", quality_report)\n+    write_json(out_dir / {\n+        \"batch_id\": result[\"batch_id\"],\n+        \"date\": result[\"day\"],\n+        \"generated_at\": datetime.now(UTC).isoformat(),\n+        \"governing_rule\": GOVERNING_RULE,\n+        \"distribution_plan\": result[\"plan\"],\n+        \"counts\": {\"total\": len(drafts), \"by_channel\": by_channel},\n+        \"safety_flags\": MANDATORY_SAFETY_FLAGS,\n+ \"top_50_priority.md\",\n+            \"rejected_drafts.jsonl\",\n+            \"needs_research.jsonl\",\n+            \"quality_report.json\",\n+            \"compliance_report.json\",\n+ Queued for your approval.\n+  4. ``scorecard.md`` — today's founder scorecard template.\n+  5. ``OPERATOR_PACK.md`` — the single index that ties it all together.\n+\n+Honors the doctrine (enforced by tests):\n+  - No external send. Deterministic, conservative.\n+SECTOR_FIT = {\n+    \"b2b_services\": 92,\n+    \"consulting\": 90,\n+    \"agency\": 88,\n+    \"saas\": 88,\n+    \"it_services\": 86,\n+    \"financial_services\": 80,\n+    \"logistics\": 76,\n+    \"distribution\": 74,\n+    \"manufacturing\": 70,\n+    \"real_estate\": 68,\n+    \"healthcare\": 66,\n+    \"retail\": 64,\n+    \"education\": 62,\n+    \"events\": 58,\n+    \"agritech\": 60,\n+}\n+\n+INBOUND_SOURCES = {\"inbound_form\", \"inbound_whatsapp\", \"inbound_email\", \"demo_request\"}\n+WARM_SOURCES = {\"warm_intro\", \"partner_referral\", \"referral\"}\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(slots=True)\n+class Prospect:\n+    name: str\n+    sector: str\n+    city: str = \"\"\n+    country: str = \"SA\"\n+    domain: str = \"\"\n+    contact_name: str = \"\"\n+    contact_title: str = \"\"\n+    source: str = \"manual_research\"\n+    locale: str = \"ar-SA\"\n+    annual_turnover_sar: int = 0\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+    @classmethod\n+    def from_row(cls, row: dict[str, str]) -> Prospect:\n+        def s(key: str, default: str = \"\") -> str:\n+            return (row.get(key) or default).strip()\n+\n+        turnover_raw = s(\"annual_turnover_sar\", \"0\").replace(\",\", \"\")\n+        try:\n+            turnover = int(float(turnover_raw)) if turnover_raw else 0\n+        except ValueError:\n+            turnover = 0\n+        return cls(\n+            name=s(\"name\"),\n+            sector=s(\"sector\").lower(),\n+            city=s(\"city\"),\n+            country=s(\"country\", \"SA\"),\n+            domain=s(\"domain\"),\n+            contact_name=s(\"contact_name\"),\n+            contact_title=s(\"contact_title\"),\n+            source=s(\"source\", \"manual_research\").lower(),\n+            locale=s(\"locale\", \"ar-SA\"),\n+            annual_turnover_sar=turnover,\n+            notes=s(\"notes\"),\n+        )\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(slots=True)\n+class ScoredProspect:\n+    prospect: Prospect\n+    icp: int\n+    dimensions: dict[str, int]\n+    decision: str\n+    qual_score: int\n+    recommended_offer: str\n+    reasons: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+    doctrine_violations: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+\n+    @property\n+    def is_owner(self) -> bool:\n+        return self.prospect.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+\n+# ── Deterministic scoring ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _budget_signal(turnover: int) -> int:\n+    if turnover <= 0:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 500_000:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 1_000_000:\n+        return 55\n+    if turnover < 3_000_000:\n+        return 75\n+    if turnover < 7_000_000:\n+        return 85\n+    return 90\n+\n+\n+def _decision_velocity(source: str, is_owner: bool) -> int:\n+    if source in INBOUND_SOURCES:\n+        base = 85\n+    elif source in WARM_SOURCES:\n+        base = 72\n+    else:\n+        base = 40\n+    if is_owner:\n+        base += 8\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _governance_posture(country: str, notes: str) -> int:\n+    base = 62 if country.upper() == \"SA\" else 50\n+    hay = notes.lower()\n+    if any(\n+        k in hay\n+        for k in (\n+            \"pdpl\",\n+            \"zatca\",\n+            \"compliance\",\n+            \"governance\",\n+            \"audit\",\n+            \"data-sensitive\",\n+            \"data sensitive\",\n+        )\n+    ):\n+        base += 18\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _data_maturity(p: Prospect) -> int:\n+    base = 40\n+    if p.domain:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.annual_turnover_sar > 0:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.sector in {\"saas\", \"it_services\", \"financial_services\"}:\n+        base += 12\n+    if any(\n+        k in p.notes.lower()\n+        for k in (\"existing data\", \"crm\", \"pipeline\", \"data-mature\", \"data mature\")\n+    ):\n+        base += 10\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def derive_dimensions(p: Prospect) -> ICPDimensions:\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+    return ICPDimensions(\n+        b2b_service_fit=SECTOR_FIT.get(p.sector, 55),\n+        data_maturity=_data_maturity(p),\n+        governance_posture=_governance_posture(p.country, p.notes),\n+        budget_signal=_budget_signal(p.annual_turnover_sar),\n+        decision_velocity=_decision_velocity(p.source, is_owner),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def score_prospect(p: Prospect) -> ScoredProspect:\n+    dims = derive_dimensions(p)\n+    icp = icp_score(dims)\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+    verdict = qualify(\n+        pain_clear=p.source in INBOUND_SOURCES\n+        or \"struggl\" in p.notes.lower()\n+        or \"wants\" in p.notes.lower(),\n+        owner_present=is_owner,\n+        data_available=dims.data_maturity >= 60,\n+        accepts_governance=True,  # pre-screen assumption; confirmed on the call\n+        has_budget=dims.budget_signal >= 55,\n+        wants_safe_methods=True,\n+        proof_path_visible=True,\n+        retainer_path_visible=dims.budget_signal >= 75,\n+        raw_request_text=p.notes,\n+        sector=p.sector,\n+        city=p.city,\n+    )\n+    return ScoredProspect(\n+        prospect=p,\n+        icp=icp,\n+        dimensions=asdict(dims),\n+        decision=verdict.decision,\n+        qual_score=verdict.score,\n+        recommended_offer=verdict.recommended_offer,\n+        reasons=list(verdict.reasons),\n+        doctrine_violations=list(verdict.doctrine_violations),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+# ── Talking points ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+DECISION_BADGE = {\n+    \"accept\": \"✅ accept — reach out today\",\n+    \"diagnostic_only\": \"🔵 diagnostic-only — lead with the free diagnostic\",\n+    \"reframe\": \"🟡 reframe — book a short scope call\",\n+    \"reject\": \"🔴 reject — doctrine risk, decline politely\",\n+    \"refer_out\": \"⚪ refer-out — not enough fit\",\n+}\n+\n+\n+def _offer_label(key: str) -> str:\n+    en, ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(key, (key, key, \"—\"))\n+    return f\"{en} / {ar} · {price}\"\n+\n+\n+def talking_points(sp: ScoredProspect) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:\n+    p = sp.prospect\n+    offer_en, offer_ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(\n+        sp.recommended_offer, (sp.recommended_offer, sp.recommended_offer, \"—\")\n+    )\n+    ar = [\n+        f\"الافتتاح: «لاحظت أن {p.name} في قطاع {p.sector} — نساعد شركات مثلكم على ترتيب الفرص وتنظيف البيانات تحت حوكمة AI واضحة.»\",\n+        f\"الربط بالألم: استند إلى ملاحظتك ({p.notes or 'تحديات متابعة العملاء'}).\",\n+        f\"العرض المقترح: {offer_ar} ({price}) — ابدأ صغير، أثبت القيمة، بدون وعود.\",\n+        \"الحوكمة كميزة: لا scraping، لا رسائل باردة، موافقتك قبل أي إجراء خارجي + Proof Pack.\",\n+        \"الخطوة التالية: احجز 20 دقيقة، أو ابدأ بالتشخيص المجاني خلال 24 ساعة.\",\n+    ]\n+    en = [\n+        f\"Open: “I noticed {p.name} in {p.sector} — we help similar Saudi B2B teams rank opportunities and clean their data under explicit AI governance.”\",\n+        f\"Tie to pain: anchor on your note ({p.notes or 'lead follow-up gaps'}).\",\n+        f\"Recommend: {offer_en} ({price}) — start small, prove value, no promises.\",\n+        \"Governance as the edge: no scraping, no cold messaging, your approval before any Queued for your approval.\n+  4. ``scorecard.md`` — today's founder scorecard template.\n+  5. ``OPERATOR_PACK.md`` — the single index that ties it all together.\n+\n+Honors the doctrine (enforced by tests):\n+  - No external send. Every artifact is a file you read, edit, and act on.\n+  - No scraping. Prospects come from the CSV you control (a clearly-labelled\n+    sample seed ships so the command runs out-of-the-box on a fresh clone).\n+  - No guaranteed outcomes / no invented metrics. Estimates are labelled.\n+  - Every recommended action carries a ``governance_decision`` and the\n+    bilingual disclaimer.\n+\n+Usage:\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py                      # uses the sample seed\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --prospects data/prospects.csv\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --warm-list data/warm_list.csv\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --top 8 --date 2026-06-07\n+    python scripts/dealix_day0.py --json               # machine-readable summary\n+\n+Exit codes:\n+    0  operator pack generated\n+    1  no prospect rows found (seed missing or empty)\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import argparse\n+import csv\n+import json\n+import sys\n+from dataclasses import asdict, dataclass, field\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent\n+sys.path.insert(0, str(REPO_ROOT))\n+\n+from auto_client_acquisition.sales_os.icp_score import ICPDimensions, icp_score  # noqa: E402\n+from auto_client_acquisition.sales_os.qualification import qualify  # noqa: E402\n+\n+DISCLAIMER = (\n+    \"Estimated value is not Verified value / القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة. \"\n+    \"Estimated outcomes are not guaranteed outcomes / النتائج التقديرية ليست نتائج مضمونة.\"\n+)\n+\n+# The 5-rung commercial ladder (priced, wired). Deterministic, conservative.\n+SECTOR_FIT = {\n+    \"b2b_services\": 92,\n+    \"consulting\": 90,\n+    \"agency\": 88,\n+    \"saas\": 88,\n+    \"it_services\": 86,\n+    \"financial_services\": 80,\n+    \"logistics\": 76,\n+    \"distribution\": 74,\n+    \"manufacturing\": 70,\n+    \"real_estate\": 68,\n+    \"healthcare\": 66,\n+    \"retail\": 64,\n+    \"education\": 62,\n+ \"\"\n+    contact_title: str = \"\"\n+    source: str = \"manual_research\"\n+    locale: str = \"ar-SA\"\n+    annual_turnover_sar: int = 0\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+    @classmethod\n+    def from_row(cls, row: dict[str, str]) -> Prospect:\n+        def s(key: str, default: str = \"\") -> str:\n+            return (row.get(key) or default).strip()\n+\n+        turnover_raw = Deterministic scoring ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _budget_signal(turnover: int) -> int:\n+    if turnover <= 0:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 500_000:\n+ _decision_velocity(source: str, is_owner: bool) -> int:\n+    if source in INBOUND_SOURCES:\n+        base = 85\n+    elif source in WARM_SOURCES:\n+        base = 72\n+    else:\n+        base = 40\n+    if is_owner:\n+        base += 8\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _governance_posture(country: str, notes: str) -> int:\n+    base = 62 if country.upper() == \"SA\" else 50\n+    hay = notes.lower()\n+    if any(\n+        k in hay\n+        for k in (\n+            \"pdpl\",\n+            \"zatca\",\n+            \"compliance\",\n+            \"governance\",\n+            \"audit\",\n+            \"data-sensitive\",\n+            \"data sensitive\",\n+        )\n+    ):\n+        base += 18\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _data_maturity(p: Prospect) -> int:\n+    base = 40\n+    if p.domain:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.annual_turnover_sar > 0:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.sector in {\"saas\", \"it_services\", \"financial_services\"}:\n+        base += 12\n+    if any(\n+        k in p.notes.lower()\n+        for k in (\"existing data\", \"crm\", \"pipeline\", \"data-mature\", \"data mature\")\n+    ):\n+        base += 10\n+    return min(100, b2b_service_fit=SECTOR_FIT.get(p.sector, 55),\n+        data_maturity=_data_maturity(p),\n+        governance_posture=_governance_posture(p.country, p.notes),\n+        budget_signal=_budget_signal(p.annual_turnover_sar),\n+        decision_velocity=_decision_velocity(p.source, is_owner),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def score_prospect(p: Prospect) -> ScoredProspect:\n+    dims = fit\",\n+}\n+\n+\n+def _offer_label(key: str) -> str:\n+    en, ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(key, (key, key, \"—\"))\n+    return f\"{en} / {ar} · {price}\"\n+\n+\n+def talking_points(sp: ScoredProspect) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:\n+    p = sp.prospect\n+    offer_en, offer_ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(\n+        sp.recommended_offer, (sp.recommended_offer, sp.recommended_offer, {p.sector} — we help similar Saudi B2B teams rank opportunities and clean their data under explicit AI governance.”\",\n+        f\"Tie to pain: anchor on your note ({p.notes or 'lead follow-up s(\"annual_turnover_sar\", \"0\").replace(\",\", \"\")\n+        try:\n+            turnover = int(float(turnover_raw)) if turnover_raw else 0\n+        except ValueError:\n+            turnover = 0\n+        return cls(\n+            name=s(\"name\"),\n+            sector=s(\"sector\").lower(),\n+            city=s(\"city\"),\n+            country=s(\"country\", \"SA\"),\n+            domain=s(\"domain\"),\n+            contact_name=s(\"contact_name\"),\n+            contact_title=s(\"contact_title\"),\n+            source=s(\"source\", \"manual_research\").lower(),\n+            locale=s(\"locale\", \"ar-SA\"),\n+            annual_turnover_sar=turnover,\n+            notes=s(\"notes\"),\n+        )\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(slots=True)\n+class ScoredProspect:\n+    prospect: Prospect\n+    icp: int\n+    dimensions: dict[str, int]\n+    decision: str\n+    qual_score: int\n+    recommended_offer: str\n+    reasons: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+    doctrine_violations: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+\n+    @property\n+    def is_owner(self) -> bool:\n+        return self.prospect.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+\n+# ── Deterministic scoring ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _budget_signal(turnover: int) -> int:\n+    if turnover <= 0:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 500_000:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 1_000_000:\n+        return 55\n+    if turnover < 3_000_000:\n+        return 75\n+    if turnover < 7_000_000:\n+        return 85\n+    return 90\n+\n+\n+def _decision_velocity(source: str, is_owner: bool) -> int:\n+    if source in INBOUND_SOURCES:\n+        base = 85\n+    elif source in WARM_SOURCES:\n+        base = 72\n+    else:\n+        base = 40\n+    if is_owner:\n+        base += 8\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _governance_posture(country: str, notes: str) -> int:\n+    base = 62 if country.upper() == \"SA\" else 50\n+    hay = notes.lower()\n+    if any(\n+        k in hay\n+        for k in (\n+            \"pdpl\",\n+            \"zatca\",\n+            \"compliance\",\n+            \"governance\",\n+            \"audit\",\n+            \"data-sensitive\",\n+            \"data sensitive\",\n+        )\n+    ):\n+        base += 18\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _data_maturity(p: Prospect) -> int:\n+    base = 40\n+    if p.domain:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.annual_turnover_sar > 0:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.sector in {\"saas\", \"it_services\", \"financial_services\"}:\n+        base += 12\n+    if any(\n+        k in p.notes.lower()\n+        for k in (\"existing data\", \"crm\", \"pipeline\", \"data-mature\", \"data mature\")\n+    ):\n+        base += 10\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def derive_dimensions(p: Prospect) -> ICPDimensions:\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+    return ICPDimensions(\n+        b2b_service_fit=SECTOR_FIT.get(p.sector, 55),\n+        data_maturity=_data_maturity(p),\n+        governance_posture=_governance_posture(p.country, p.notes),\n+        budget_signal=_budget_signal(p.annual_turnover_sar),\n+        decision_velocity=_decision_velocity(p.source, is_owner),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def score_prospect(p: Prospect) -> ScoredProspect:\n+    dims = derive_dimensions(p)\n+    icp = icp_score(dims)\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+    verdict = qualify(\n+        pain_clear=p.source in INBOUND_SOURCES\n+        or pre-screen assumption; confirmed on the call\n+        has_budget=dims.budget_signal >= 55,\n+        wants_safe_methods=True,\n+        proof_path_visible=True,\n+        retainer_path_visible=dims.budget_signal >= 75,\n+        raw_request_text=p.notes,\n+        sector=p.sector,\n+        city=p.city,\n+    )\n+    return ScoredProspect(\n+        prospect=p,\n+ reasons=list(verdict.reasons),\n+        doctrine_violations=list(verdict.doctrine_violations),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+# ── Talking points fit\",\n+}\n+\n+\n+def _offer_label(key: str) -> str:\n+    en, ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(key, (key, key, \"—\"))\n+    return f\"{en} / {ar} · {price}\"\n+\n+\n+def talking_points(sp: ScoredProspect) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:\n+    p = sp.prospect\n+    offer_en, offer_ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(\n+        sp.recommended_offer, (sp.recommended_offer, sp.recommended_offer, {p.sector} — we help similar Saudi B2B teams rank opportunities and clean their data under explicit AI governance.”\",\n+        f\"Tie to pain: anchor on your note ({p.notes or 'lead follow-up Do not pursue.\"]\n+    return ar, en\n+\n+\n+# ── Renderers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _gov_block(decision_summary: str) -> str:\n+    return (\n+        \"> **governance_decision:** `internal_artifact` · no external action taken · \"\n+        f\"{decision_summary}\\n>\\n> _{DISCLAIMER}_\\n\"\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def render_prospects_md(scored: list[ScoredProspect], generated: str) -> str:\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Prospect shortlist — قائمة العملاء المحتملين (مُقيّمة ومرتّبة)\\n\",\n+        f\"_Generated: {generated}_\\n\",\n+        \"\\n> **Source:** the prospect CSV you control. locale=s(\"locale\", \"ar-SA\"),\n+            annual_turnover_sar=turnover,\n+            notes=s(\"notes\"),\n+        )\n+\n+\n+@dataclass(slots=True)\n+class ScoredProspect:\n+    prospect: doctrine_violations: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n+\n+    @property\n+    def is_owner(self) -> bool:\n+        return self.prospect.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+\n+# ── Deterministic scoring ───────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _budget_signal(turnover: int) -> int:\n+    if turnover <= 0:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 500_000:\n+        return 35\n+    if turnover < 1_000_000:\n+        return 55\n+    if turnover < 3_000_000:\n+        return 75\n+    if turnover < 7_000_000:\n+        return 85\n+    return 90\n+\n+\n+def _decision_velocity(source: str, is_owner: bool) -> int:\n+    if source in INBOUND_SOURCES:\n+        base = 85\n+    elif source in WARM_SOURCES:\n+        base = 72\n+    else:\n+        base = 40\n+    if is_owner:\n+        base += 8\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _governance_posture(country: str, notes: str) -> int:\n+    base = 62 if country.upper() == \"SA\" else 50\n+    hay = notes.lower()\n+    if any(\n+        k in hay\n+        for k in (\n+            \"pdpl\",\n+            \"zatca\",\n+            \"compliance\",\n+            \"governance\",\n+            \"audit\",\n+            \"data-sensitive\",\n+            \"data sensitive\",\n+        )\n+    ):\n+        base += 18\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def _data_maturity(p: Prospect) -> int:\n+    base = 40\n+    if p.domain:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.annual_turnover_sar > 0:\n+        base += 18\n+    if p.sector in {\"saas\", \"it_services\", \"financial_services\"}:\n+        base += 12\n+    if any(\n+        k in p.notes.lower()\n+        for k in (\"existing data\", \"crm\", \"pipeline\", \"data-mature\", \"data mature\")\n+    ):\n+        base += 10\n+    return min(100, base)\n+\n+\n+def derive_dimensions(p: Prospect) -> ICPDimensions:\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+    return ICPDimensions(\n+        b2b_service_fit=SECTOR_FIT.get(p.sector, 55),\n+        data_maturity=_data_maturity(p),\n+        governance_posture=_governance_posture(p.country, p.notes),\n+        budget_signal=_budget_signal(p.annual_turnover_sar),\n+        decision_velocity=_decision_velocity(p.source, is_owner),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def score_prospect(p: Prospect) -> ScoredProspect:\n+    dims = derive_dimensions(p)\n+    icp = icp_score(dims)\n+    is_owner = p.contact_title.upper() in OWNER_TITLES\n+\n+    verdict = qualify(\n+        pain_clear=p.source in INBOUND_SOURCES\n+        or \"struggl\" in p.notes.lower()\n+        or \"wants\" in p.notes.lower(),\n+        owner_present=is_owner,\n+        data_available=dims.data_maturity >= 60,\n+        accepts_governance=True,  # pre-screen assumption; confirmed on the call\n+        has_budget=dims.budget_signal >= 55,\n+        wants_safe_methods=True,\n+        proof_path_visible=True,\n+        retainer_path_visible=dims.budget_signal >= 75,\n+        raw_request_text=p.notes,\n+        sector=p.sector,\n+        city=p.city,\n+    )\n+    return ScoredProspect(\n+        prospect=p,\n+        icp=icp,\n+        dimensions=asdict(dims),\n+        decision=verdict.decision,\n+        qual_score=verdict.score,\n+        recommended_offer=verdict.recommended_offer,\n+        reasons=list(verdict.reasons),\n+        doctrine_violations=list(verdict.doctrine_violations),\n+    )\n+\n+\n+# ── Talking points ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+DECISION_BADGE = {\n+    \"accept\": \"✅ accept — reach out today\",\n+    \"diagnostic_only\": \"🔵 diagnostic-only — lead with the free diagnostic\",\n+    \"reframe\": \"🟡 reframe — book a short scope call\",\n+    \"reject\": \"🔴 reject — doctrine risk, decline politely\",\n+    \"refer_out\": \"⚪ refer-out — not enough fit\",\n+}\n+\n+\n+def _offer_label(key: str) -> str:\n+    en, ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(key, (key, key, \"—\"))\n+    return f\"{en} / {ar} · {price}\"\n+\n+\n+def talking_points(sp: ScoredProspect) -> tuple[list[str], list[str]]:\n+    p = sp.prospect\n+    offer_en, offer_ar, price = OFFER_LADDER.get(\n+        sp.recommended_offer, (sp.recommended_offer, sp.recommended_offer, \"—\")\n+    )\n+    ar = [\n+        f\"الافتتاح: «لاحظت أن {p.name} في قطاع {p.sector} — نساعد شركات مثلكم على ترتيب الفرص وتنظيف البيانات تحت حوكمة AI واضحة.»\",\n+        f\"الربط بالألم: استند إلى ملاحظتك ({p.notes or 'تحديات متابعة العملاء'}).\",\n+        f\"العرض المقترح: {offer_ar} ({price}) — ابدأ صغير، أثبت القيمة، بدون وعود.\",\n+        \"الحوكمة كميزة: لا scraping، لا رسائل باردة، موافقتك قبل أي إجراء خارجي + Proof Pack.\",\n+        \"الخطوة التالية: احجز 20 دقيقة، أو ابدأ بالتشخيص المجاني خلال 24 ساعة.\",\n+    ]\n+    en = [\n+        f\"Open: “I noticed {p.name} in {p.sector} — we help similar Saudi B2B teams rank opportunities and clean their data under explicit AI governance.”\",\n+        f\"Tie to pain: anchor on your note ({p.notes or 'lead follow-up gaps'}).\",\n+        f\"Recommend: {offer_en} ({price}) — start small, prove value, no promises.\",\n+        \"Governance as the edge: no scraping, no cold messaging, your approval before any external action + a Proof Pack.\",\n+        \"Next step: book 20 minutes, or start the free 24h diagnostic.\",\n+    ]\n+    if sp.decision in (\"reject\", \"refer_out\"):\n+        ar = [\"هذا المُرشّح غير ملائم الآن — اعتذر بلطف أو أحِله لشريك. لا تتابع.\"]\n+        en = [\"Not a fit right now — decline politely or refer to a partner. Do not pursue.\"]\n+    return ar, en\n+\n+\n+# ── Renderers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+\n+def _gov_block(decision_summary: str) -> str:\n+    return (\n+        \"> **governance_decision:** `internal_artifact` · no external action taken · \"\n+        f\"{decision_summary}\\n>\\n> _{DISCLAIMER}_\\n\"\n+    )\n+\n+\n+def render_prospects_md(scored: list[ScoredProspect], generated: str) -> str:\n+    lines = [\n+        \"# Prospect shortlist — قائمة العملاء المحتملين (مُقيّمة ومرتّبة)\\n\",\n+        f\"_Generated: {generated}_\\n\",\n+        \"\\n> **Source:** the prospect CSV you control. The shipped seed is a \"\n+        \"clearly-labelled **SAMPLE** — replace it with your real list \"\n+        \"(`data/prospects.csv`). No data was scraped.\\n\",\n+        _gov_block(\"ranking is a deterministic estimate from the fields you provided\"),\n+        \"\\n| # | Company | Sector | City | ICP | Verdict | Recommended offer |\\n\",\n+        \"|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|\\n\",\n+    ]\n+    for i, sp in enumerate(scored, 1):\n+        p = sp.prospect\n+        lines.append(\n+            f\"| {i} | {p.name} | {p.sector} | {p.city or '—'} | **{sp.icp}** | \"\n+            f\"{sp.decision} | {_offer_label(sp.recommended_offer)} |\\n\"\n+        )\n+    lines.append(\"\\n## Dimension detail\\n\")\n+    for i, f\"`{sp.decision}`\\n\"\n+            f\"- fit={d['b2b_service_fit']} · data={d['data_maturity']} · \"\n+            f\"gov={d['governance_posture']} · budget={d['budget_signal']} · \"\n+            f\"velocity={d['decision_velocity']}\\n\"\n+            f\"- reasons: {', '.join(sp.reasons) or '—'}\\n\"\n+        )\n+        if sp.doctrine_violations:\n+            lines.append(f\"- ⚠ doctrine: {', '.join(sp.doctrine_violations)}\\n\")\n+    lines.append(f\"\\n---\\n_{DISCLAIMER}_\\n\")\n+    return \"\".join(lines)\n+\n+\n+def render_prospects_csv(scored: list[ScoredProspect], out_path: Path) -> None:\n+    with out_path.open(\"w\", encoding=\"utf-8\", newline=\"\") as f:\n+        w = csv.writer(f)\n+        w.writerow(\n+            [\n+                \"rank\",\n+                \"name\",\n+                \"sector\",\n+                \"city\",\n+                \"contact_name\",\n+                \"contact_title\",\n+                \"icp_score\",\n+                \"qualification_score\",\n+                \"decision\",\n+                \"recommended_offer\",\n+                \"b2b_service_fit\",\n+                \"data_maturity\",\n+                \"governance_posture\",\n+                \"budget_signal\",\n+                \"decision_velocity\",\n+                \"source\",\n+            ]\n+        )\n+        for i, sp in enumerate(scored, 1):\n+            p, d = sp.prospect, sp.dimensions\n+            w.writerow(\n+                [\n+                    i,\n+                    p.name,\n+                    p.sector,\n+ d[\"budget_signal\"],\n+                    d[\"decision_velocity\"],\n+                    p.source,\n+                ]\n+            )\n+\n+\n+def render_call_list_md(scored: list[ScoredProspect], الاتصال اليوم\\n\",\n+        f\"_Generated: {generated}_\\n\",\n+        \"\\n> **You make every contact.** This is a prioritized list with talking \"\n+        \"points. الحوار (عربي)\\n\"\n+        )\n+        for pt in ar_points:\n+            lines.append(f\"  - {pt}\\n\")\n+        lines.append(\"\\n### Talking points (English)\\n\")\n+        for pt in lines.append(\"\\n_No actionable prospects in this batch — add real rows to your CSV._\\n\")\n+    lines.append(f\"\\n_{DISCLAIMER}_\\n\")\n+    return \"\".join(lines)\n+\n+\n+def حُلّ / The headline fix — doctrine violation on the home page\nالصفحة الرئيسية (أول ما يراه الزائر) كانت تعرض **شعارات عملاء وهمية، أرقامًا مُختلقة** (+500 عميل، 3.2x، 99.9%)، **وشهادات عملاء التصميم): قطاعات مستهدفة بدل عملاء وهميين، إحصاءات قدرات صادقة، قسم \"كيف يعمل\"، قسم **الدفعة التأسيسية** الصريح، وشارة **\"نتائج موثّقة فقط — لا أرقام مُختلقة\"**. الصدق أصبح ميزة `/contact`، `/terms`، و **`/custom-ai`** (صفحة تحديد نطاق الـ AI المخصص — \"قل لنا ماذا نبني\").\n- ثنائية اللغة AR+EN، على القشرة الرسمية، ونماذج بتدهور آمن (لا \"تم الاستلام\" كاذبة عند الفشل).\n- `Guaranteed SLA` → `Defined SLA`.\n\n**النشر / Deploy**\n- إعادة توجيه `Dockerfile.web` ليبني الواجهة المرجعية `frontend/` (Next.js standalone) بدل `apps/web` الأبسط — حتى يكون القمع التجاري الحقيقي هو المنشور. `apps/web` تبقى عبر `apps/web/Dockerfile`.\n\n**الماكينة التجارية / Commercial engine** (متوافقة مع العقيدة — درافتات بانتظار الموافقة، لا إرسال)\n- حزمة انطلاق اليوم-0 في `docs/commercial/daily_ops/`: موجز يومي للمؤسس، تحقّق قائمة الاستهداف (249 هدفًا نشطًا)، تصدير outreach مُرتّب بالأولوية (CSV بـ249 صفًا + why-now + العرض الموصى + قناة أول لمسة)، و**10 مسودات لمسة أولى ثنائية اللغة مؤهَّلة**. كل الأسماء `{{placeholder}}` — لا scraping، لا جهات اتصال مُختلَقة، لا إرسال آلي.\n\n**حارس + خطة / Guard + plan**\n- `tests/test_no_fabricated_web_claims.py` — يفشل CI .\reports\github-context\pr-621\detail.json:9:  "body": "## Dealix Research & Targeting OS\n\nA repeatable, **governed** daily loop that turns seeds + allowlisted research into a scored, evidence-backed **target pool** — not an outbound blaster. **Quality over volume. No external send without founder approval.**\n\n> The \"400\" is a research/analysis pool, **not** 400 messages.\n\n### What it does\n1. Collect (seeds ± allowlisted discovery) → 2. Normalize (AR/EN names + domains) → 3. De-dupe (domain, then name; merge evidence) → 4. Attach evidence → 5. Score (100-pt model) → 6. Infer weakness → Dealix OS → 7. Recommend offer rung → 8. Emit raw pool / shortlist → 9. Build **review-only** drafts.\n\n### Scoring (100 pts)\nICP Fit 35 · Pain Signal 25 · Intent/Timing 20 · Access 10 · Evidence Confidence 10 · Risk Penalty −20 → grades A+/A/B/C/D.\n\n**Golden rule (enforced):** never target without **2 pain evidences OR a warm path** — otherwise the grade is capped at **B** and routed to a free Diagnostic.\n\n### Weakness → Dealix OS\nProof weakness→Proof OS · Follow-up leakage→Revenue OS · Delivery visibility→Delivery OS · Support recurrence→Support OS · Executive decision fog→Command OS · Data fragmentation→Data OS.\n\n### Governance / non-negotiables\n- Reuses the canonical doctrine guard `safe_send_gateway` + `governance_os.claim_safety`.\n- Allowed sources pinned in `data/targeting/source_allowlist.json`; **blocked sources hard-rejected and logged**.\n- No scraping behind login · no robots.txt/CAPTCHA bypass · no LinkedIn automation · no cold/bulk WhatsApp · no mass email · **no auto-send** · no claim without evidence.\n\n### Files\n| Path | Purpose |\n| --- | --- |\n| `scripts/research_targeting_os.py` | The engine (dependency-light, importable, CLI). |\n| `data/targeting/{company_seed_template.csv,queries.txt,source_allowlist.json}` | Inputs. |\n| `docs/go-to-market/RESEARCH_TARGETING_OS.md` | System spec (AR+EN). |\n| `docs/go-to-market/DAILY_400_TARGETING_PLAYBOOK.md` | Daily ritual (AR+EN). |\n| `docs/governance/PROSPECT_RESEARCH_COMPLIANCE_POLICY.md` | Binding policy (AR+EN). |\n| `.github/workflows/daily-targeting-os.yml` | 08:00 Riyadh; artifacts only; never sends. |\n| `tests/test_research_targeting_os.py` | 23 tests. |\n\n### Outputs (`data/targeting/out/`, gitignored)\n`ranked_targets.csv` · `ranked_targets.jsonl` · `daily_targeting_brief.md` · `drafts_for_review.md` · `weakness_map.md`\n\n### Run\n```bash\npython scripts/research_targeting_os.py \\\n  --seed data/targeting/company_seed_template.csv \\\n  --out data/targeting/out --top 50\n```\nOptional allowlisted discovery via `GOOGLE_SEARCH_API_KEY` + `GOOGLE_SEARCH_CX` (graceful seed-only fallback when keys absent — reads public result metadata only, no scraping).\n\n### Tests\n`tests/test_research_targeting_os.py` — **23 passed, 1 skipped** (the skip runs from repo root). `tests/test_doctrine_guardrails.py` still passes. ruff + black (py311) clean on the new files.\n\n> Discovery provider can be swapped (Vertex AI Search / SerpAPI / Tavily / Brave) without changing the engine or the policy.\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_01EMmqgsT4T39K1GqAB6uH3e\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01EMmqgsT4T39K1GqAB6uH3e)_",

All outputs are drafts for review.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+import argparse\n+import json\n+import os\n+import subprocess\n+import sys\n+from datetime import datetime\n+from pathlib import Path\n+\n+REPO = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent\n+REPORTS_DIR = REPO / \"reports\" / \"operator\"\n+EXPORTS_DIR = REPO / \"business\" / \"reports\" / \"exports\"\n+CEO_BRIEF_DIR = REPO / \"business\" / \"reports\" / \"exports\"\n+\n+def ensure_dirs():\n+    REPORTS_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    EXPORTS_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    CEO_BRIEF_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    (REPO / \"business\" / \"sales-machine\" / \"exports\").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    (REPO / \"business\" / \"persuasion\" / \"exports\").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    (REPO / \"business\" / \"crm\" / \"exports\").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+    (REPO / \"business\" / \"proposals\" / \"generated\").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n+\n+def log(msg: str):\n+    print(f\"[DailyOperator] {msg}\")\n+\n+def run_script(path: str, args: list = None) -> int:\n+    cmd = [sys.executable, str(REPO / path)]\n+    if args:\n+        cmd.extend(args)\n+    log(f\"Running: {' '.join(cmd)}\")\n+    return subprocess.call(cmd)\n+\n+def write_md(path: Path, title: str, sections: dict):\n+    lines = [f\"# {title}\", f\"Generated: {datetime.utcnow().isoformat()}Z\", \"\"]\n+    for heading, body in sections.items():\n+        lines.append(f\"## {heading}\")\n+        lines.append(body if body else \"_No data._\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+    path.write_text(\"\\n\".join(lines), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+\n+def main():\n+    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Dealix Daily Operator\")\n+    parser.add_argument(\"--mode\", choices=[\"demo\", \"production\"], default=\"demo\")\n+    parser.add_argument(\"--leads\", default=None, help=\"Path to leads CSV (production only)\")\n+    args = parser.parse_args()\n+\n+    ensure_dirs()\n+    today = datetime.utcnow().strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d\")\n+    summary_sections = {}\n+\n+    # 1. Check no secrets\n+    log(\"Step 1: Secret scan\")\n+    rc = run_script(\"scripts/check_no_secrets.py\")\n+    summary_sections[\"Secret Scan\"] = \"PASS\" if rc == 0 else \"FAIL\"\n+\n+    # 2. Verify ultimate OS\n+    log(\"Step 2: Ultimate OS verification\")\n+    rc = run_script(\"scripts/verify_dealix_ultimate_os.py\")\n+    summary_sections[\"Ultimate OS Verification\"] = \"PASS\" if rc == 0 else \"FAIL\"\n+\n+    # 3. Import demo/sample leads if no data exists\n+    log(\"Step 3: Lead import\")\n+    leads_path = args.leads or str(REPO / \"data\" / \"imports\" / \"leads.csv\")\n+    if Path(leads_path).exists():\n+        rc = run_script(\"scripts/import_leads.py\", [\"--file\", leads_path, \"--dry-run\" if args.mode == \"demo\" else \"--apply\"])",

Skips** (archive-only, with reasons documented):\n- Duplicates: 80+ `landing/` pages, bilingual `[locale]/{pricing,privacy,services}` pages, war room, CRM, offers.\n- Destructive: `dealix-launch-readiness.yml` (runs data-mutating scripts on **every PR/push**); frontend page overwrites that would inject a **3rd conflicting pricing model**.\n\n**4. \"[DRAFT_ONLY — requires approval before sending]\"\n+)\n+\n+PRESENTATION_LINK = \"https://dealix.me/proposal\"\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# Optional YAML loader\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def _load_yaml_templates(path: Path) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n+    \"\"\"Load outreach templates from YAML. Returns None if unavailable.\"\"\"\n+    if not _YAML_AVAILABLE:\n+        return None\n+    if not path.exists():\n+        return None\n+    try:\n+        with path.open(encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n+            return _yaml.safe_load(fh)\n+    except Exception:\n+        return None\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# CSV target loader\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def load_targets(csv_path: Path) -> list[dict[str, str]]:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Load companies from a CSV file.\n+\n+    Expected columns (any extras are ignored):\n+        company, sector, city, email, contact_name\n+\n+    Returns a list of dicts — empty list if file is absent.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    if not csv_path.exists():\n+        return []\n+    rows: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n+    with csv_path.open(encoding=\"utf-8-sig\", newline=\"\") as fh:\n+        reader = csv.DictReader(fh)\n+        for row in reader:\n+            rows.append({k.strip().lower(): (v or \"\").strip() for k, v in row.items()})\n+    return rows\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# Draft rendering\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def _angle_ar(sector: str, yaml_data: dict[str, Any] | None) -> str:\n+    if yaml_data:\n+        try:\n+            tmpl = yaml_data.get(\"email\", {}).get(\"body_ar\", \"\")\n+            if tmpl and \"{angle}\" not in tmpl:\n+                # yaml provides a full body — extract angle-like content\n+                pass\n+        except Exception:\n+            pass\n+    return ANGLES_AR.get(sector, ANGLES_AR[\"b2b_services\"])\n+\n+\n+def _angle_en(sector: str, yaml_data: dict[str, Any] | None) -> str:\n+    return ANGLES_EN.get(sector, ANGLES_EN[\"b2b_services\"])\n+\n+\n+def render_draft(\n+    company: dict[str, str],\n+    language: str,\n+    yaml_data: dict[str, Any] | None,\n+    draft_index: int,\n+) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Render a single draft for one company in one language.\n+\n+    Returns a flat dict suitable for CSV row + gmail_queue entry.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    sector = company.get(\"sector\", \"b2b_services\").strip() or \"b2b_services\"\n+    company_name = company.get(\"company\", company.get(\"company_name\", \"الشركة\")).strip() or \"الشركة\"\n+    city = company.get(\"city\", \"\").strip()\n+    contact_name = company.get(\"contact_name\", \"\").strip()\n+    email_addr = company.get(\"email\", \"\").strip()\n+\n+    now_iso = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(timespec=\"seconds\")\n+\n+    if language == \"ar\":\n+        subject = SUBJECT_AR_TEMPLATE.format(company=company_name)\n+        angle = _angle_ar(sector, yaml_data)\n+        body = BODY_AR_TEMPLATE.format(\n+            company=company_name,\n+            angle=angle,\n+            presentation_link=PRESENTATION_LINK,\n+        )\n+    else:\n+        subject = SUBJECT_EN_TEMPLATE.format(company=company_name)\n+        angle = _angle_en(sector, yaml_data)\n+        body = BODY_EN_TEMPLATE.format(\n+            company=company_name,\n+            angle=angle,\n+            presentation_link=PRESENTATION_LINK,\n+        )\n+\n+    draft_id = f\"draft_{draft_index:04d}\"\n+\n+    return {\n+        \"id\": draft_id,\n+        \"company\": company_name,\n+        \"sector\": sector,\n+        \"city\": city,\n+        \"contact_name\": contact_name,\n+        \"email\": email_addr,\n+        \"language\": language,\n+        \"subject\": subject,\n+        \"body\": body,\n+        \"channel\": \"email\",\n+        \"status\": \"draft_only\",\n+        \"approval_required\": True,\n+        \"created_at\": now_iso,\n+    }\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# Synthetic target generation (fallback when CSV is absent or small)\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def _synthetic_targets(sectors: list[str], count: int) -> list[dict[str, str]]:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Produce synthetic target rows so the script always generates >= count drafts\n+    even without a real CSV file.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    cities = [\"الرياض\", \"جدة\", \"الدمام\", \"مكة المكرمة\", \"المدينة المنورة\", \"الخبر\", \"أبها\"]\n+    rows: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n+    per_sector = max(1, (count // len(sectors)) + 1)\n+    idx = 0\n+    for sector in sectors:\n+        label = SECTOR_LABELS_AR.get(sector, sector)\n+        for i in range(per_sector):\n+            idx += 1\n+            rows.append(\n+                {\n+                    \"company\": f\"شركة {label} {idx}\",\n+                    \"sector\": sector,\n+                    \"city\": cities[idx % len(cities)],\n+                    \"email\": \"\",\n+                    \"contact_name\": \"\",\n+                }\n+            )\n+    return rows\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# Core generation logic\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def generate_drafts(\n+    sectors: list[str],\n+    count: int,\n+    target_date: str,\n+    targets_path: Path,\n+    lang: str,\n+    yaml_data: dict[str, Any] | None,\n+) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:\n+    \"\"\"\n+    Generate at least `count` draft records across the requested sectors and languages.\n+\n+    Returns a flat list of draft dicts.\n+    \"\"\"\n+    raw_targets = load_targets(targets_path)\n+\n+    # Filter to requested sectors\n+    if raw_targets:\n+        filtered = [r for r in raw_targets if r.get(\"sector\", \"\") in sectors]\n+        if not filtered:\n+            filtered = raw_targets  # fallback: use all if no sector match\n+    else:\n+        filtered = []\n+\n+    # Determine how many languages we need\n+    languages: list[str]\n+    if lang == \"ar\":\n+        languages = [\"ar\"]\n+    elif lang == \"en\":\n+        languages = [\"en\"]\n+    else:\n+        languages = [\"ar\", \"en\"]\n+\n+    # We need enough target rows to reach `count` total drafts across all languages.\n+    target_rows_needed = max(1, (count + len(languages) - 1) // len(languages))\n+\n+    # Interleave sectors so coverage is spread evenly across all 12 sectors\n+    from collections import defaultdict\n+    import random\n+    by_sector: dict[str, list[dict[str, str]]] = defaultdict(list)\n+    for row in filtered:\n+        by_sector[row.get(\"sector\", \"unknown\")].append(row)\n+\n+    interleaved: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n+    sector_lists = list(by_sector.values())\n+    max_len = max((len(s) for s in sector_lists), default=0)\n+    for i in range(max_len):\n+        for sl in sector_lists:\n+            if i < len(sl):\n+                interleaved.append(sl[i])\n+\n+    # Pad with synthetic rows if real data is short\n+    if len(interleaved) < target_rows_needed:\n+        synthetic = _synthetic_targets(sectors, target_rows_needed - len(interleaved))\n+        interleaved = interleaved + synthetic\n+\n+    # Trim / cycle to exact need\n+    combined: list[dict[str, str]] = []\n+    while len(combined) < target_rows_needed:\n+        combined.extend(interleaved)\n+    combined = combined[:target_rows_needed]\n+\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\n+    idx = 1\n+    for company in combined:\n+        for language in languages:\n+            if len(drafts) >= count:\n+                break\n+            draft = render_draft(company, language, yaml_data, idx)\n+            drafts.append(draft)\n+            idx += 1\n+        if len(drafts) >= count:\n+            break\n+\n+    return drafts\n+\n+\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+# Output writers\n+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n+\n+\n+def write_markdown_drafts(\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]],\n+    language: str,\n+    out_path: Path,\n+) ->
