مسودات يومية — {language.upper()}\\n\",\n+        f\"**المجموع:** {len(lang_drafts)}\\n\\n---\\n\",\n+    ]\n+    for i, d in enumerate(lang_drafts, start=1):\n+        lines.append(f\"## [{i}] {d['company']} — {d['sector']}\")\n+        lines.append(f\"**ID:** {d['id']}  \")\n+        lines.append(f\"**Subject:** {d['subject']}  \")\n+        lines.append(f\"**Status:** {d['status']} | approval_required: {d['approval_required']}\")\n+        lines.append(\"\")\n+        lines.append(d[\"body\"])\n+        lines.append(\"\\n---\\n\")\n+    out_path.write_text(\"\\n\".join(lines), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+\n+\n+def write_csv_drafts(drafts: list[dict[str, Any]], out_path: Path) -> None:\n+    \"\"\"Write all drafts to a CSV file.\"\"\"\n+    fieldnames = [\"id\", \"company\", \"sector\", \"city\", \"language\", \"subject\", \"body\", \"channel\", \"status\"]\n+    with out_path.open(\"w\", encoding=\"utf-8-sig\", newline=\"\") as fh:\n+        writer = csv.DictWriter(fh, fieldnames=fieldnames, extrasaction=\"ignore\")\n+        writer.writeheader()\n+        for d in drafts:\n+            writer.writerow(d)\n+\n+\n+def write_gmail_queue(drafts: list[dict[str, Any]], out_path: Path, limit: int) -> None:\n+    \"\"\"Write the Gmail-ready queue JSON (capped at limit entries).\"\"\"\n+    queue = []\n+    for d in drafts[:limit]:\n+        queue.append(\n+            {\n+                \"id\": d[\"id\"],\n+                \"company\": d[\"company\"],\n+                \"sector\": d[\"sector\"],\n+                \"language\": d[\"language\"],\n+                \"subject\": d[\"subject\"],\n+                \"body\": d[\"body\"],\n+                \"status\": \"draft_only\",\n+                \"approval_required\": True,\n+                \"created_at\": d[\"created_at\"],\n+            }\n+        )\n+    out_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding=\"utf-8\")\n+\n+\n+def write_summary(\n+    drafts: list[dict[str, Any]],\n+    target_date: str,\n+    out_path: Path,\n+) -> None:\n+    \"\"\"Write a human-readable daily summary in Arabic.\"\"\"\n+    ar_count = sum(1 for d in drafts if d[\"language\"] == \"ar\")\n+    en_count = sum(1 for d in drafts if d[\"language\"] == \"en\")\n+    companies = len({d[\"company\"] for d in drafts})\n+    sector_counts: dict[str, int] = {}\n+    for d in drafts:\n+        sector_counts[d[\"sector\"]] = sector_counts.get(d[\"sector\"], 0) + 1\n+\n+    sector_table_rows = \"\\n\".join(\n+        f\"| {SECTOR_LABELS_AR.get(s, s)} | {c} |\"\n+        for s, c in .\reports\github-context\pr-710\detail.json:9:  "body": "## ملخص / Summary\n\nتنفيذ كامل للبنية التجارية اليومية لـ Dealix — محرك مسودات يومي يُنتج 120 مسودة موجهة لشركات سعودية، موقع بكتالوج أنظمة احترافي، وAPI تصدير حقيقي.\n\nFull commercial execution layer: daily draft engine producing 120 bilingual outreach drafts, professional systems catalog landing page, real export API, and 154-company Saudi targeting database.\n\n---\n\n## ما تم بناؤه / What Was Built\n\n### 1. محرك المسودات اليومي — `scripts/generate_daily_mass_drafts.py`\n- ينتج **120 مسودة/يوم** موزعة على 12 قطاع سعودي (10 لكل قطاع)\n- ثنائية اللغة: 60 عربية + 60 إنجليزية\n- كل مسودة تحمل رابط PDF البريزنتيشن + `[DRAFT_ONLY]` واضح\n- مخرجات: `drafts_ar.md`, `drafts_en.md`, `drafts_all.csv`, `gmail_queue.json`, `summary.md`\n- **لا إرسال تلقائي** — جميع المسودات تحتاج موافقة صريحة\n\n### 2. قاعدة الاستهداف — `data/targets/saudi_sector_targets.csv`\n- **154 شركة سعودية** عبر 12 قطاع في 9 مدن\n- قطاعات: العقار، العيادات، التدريب، الوكالات، المطاعم، اللوجستيات، B2B، المقاولات، الفنادق، SaaS، التجزئة، القانون والمحاسبة\n\n### 3. قوالب ثنائية اللغة — `business_autopilot/templates/outreach_templates_v2.yaml`\n- **12 قطاع × AR + EN** = قوالب إيميل + واتساب + زاوية ألم مخصصة\n- كل قالب يتضمن: subject، body، زاوية القطاع، رابط PDF، Calendly، disclaimer\n\n### 4. كتالوج الأنظمة — `landing/systems-catalog.html`\n- صفحة RTL عربية (1,252 سطر) تعرض 3 مستويات من الأنظمة\n- **Tier 1 (خفيف):** 499 ريال — Review OS, Follow-up OS, Proposal Builder\n- **Tier 2 (متوسط):** 1,500–2,999 ريال — Revenue OS, Delivery OS, Client Success OS\n- **Tier 3 (ثقيل):** 5,000–25,000 ريال — Command Center OS, Enterprise AI OS, Custom Build\n- شبكة 12 قطاع مع التوصيات، نموذج طلب تشخيص مجاني، زر تحميل PDF\n\n### 5. API التصدير — `api/routers/proposals_export.py`\n```\nPOST /api/v1/proposals/render          — عرض مخصص من Jinja2\nGET  /api/v1/proposals/pitch-pdf       — تحميل PDF البريزنتيشن مباشرة\nGET  /api/v1/leads/daily-export        — تصدير CSV للمسودات اليومية\nPOST /api/v1/leads/website-inquiry     — استقبال leads من الموقع\n```\n\n### 6. الأوتوبايلوت اليومي — `scripts/daily_commercial_autopilot.sh`\n```bash\n# Cron: 0 5 * * *  (7am KSA)\nbash scripts/daily_commercial_autopilot.sh\n```\nيُشغّل: توليد 120 مسودة → تصدير leads → تقرير يومي للمؤسس\n\n### 7. PDF البريزنتيشن — `landing/assets/dealix_proposal_v2.pdf`\nمتاح للتحميل المباشر من الموقع وعبر API\n\n---\n\n## مخرجات اليوم الأول / Day-1 Output\n\n```\ndata/daily_drafts/2026-06-10/\n  drafts_ar.md      54K  — 60 مسودة عربية جاهزة للمراجعة\n  drafts_en.md      46K  — 60 مسودة إنجليزية\n  drafts_all.csv    93K  — 120 صف CSV قابل للاستيراد\n  gmail_queue.json  49K  — 120 draft جاهز للإنشاء في Gmail\n  summary.md         1K  — ملخص المؤسس\n```\n\n| القطاع | المسودات |\n|--------|---------|\n| العقار | 10 |\n| العيادات | 10 |\n| التدريب | 10 |\n| الوكالات | 10 |\n| المطاعم | 10 |\n| اللوجستيات | 10 |\n| B2B | 10 |\n| المقاولات | 10 |\n| الفنادق | 10 |\n| SaaS | 10 |\n| التجزئة | 10 |\n| القانون والمحاسبة | 10 |\n| **الإجمالي** | **120** |\n\n---\n\n## Governance Compliance\n\n- جميع المسودات تحمل `status: draft_only`, `approval_required: true`\n- لا إرسال تلقائي — Gmail: `drafts.create` فقط\n- كل مسودة تحمل disclaimer واضح\n- لا scraping، لا automation، لا PII في الـ CSV\n\n---\n\n## Test Plan\n\n- [ ] `python3 scripts/generate_daily_mass_drafts.py --dry-run --count 120` → 120 مسودة\n- [ ] `bash scripts/daily_commercial_autopilot.sh` → exit 0 + ملفات منتجة\n- [ ] فتح `landing/systems-catalog.html` في المتصفح → صفحة RTL كاملة\n- [ ] `GET /api/v1/proposals/pitch-pdf` → PDF يُحمَّل\n- [ ] `POST /api/v1/leads/website-inquiry` → `{ inquiry_id, next_step_ar }`\n- [ ] `GET /api/v1/leads/daily-export` → CSV يُصدَّر\n\nhttps://claude.ai/code/session_011Bom667qipGNKjuffedk18\n\n---\n_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_011Bom667qipGNKjuffedk18)_",

It NEVER hardcodes prices (Article 11\n++ no_invented_crm_kpi) — every figure is read from the registry and stamped as an\n+estimate (Article 8). Output defaults to `approval_status=\"approval_required\"` and\n+is never auto-sent (NO_LIVE_SEND). Guaranteed-outcome language in the request is\n+rejected (doctrine: no_guaranteed_sales_claims).\n+\n+Input:  TransformationProposalRequest (company, sector, selected_system_ids, …)\n+Output: TransformationProposal (line items from catalog + bilingual markdown)\n+Gate:   approval_required — founder reviews before anything reaches a customer.\n+\"\"\"\n+\n+from __future__ import annotations\n+\n+import hashlib\n+import json\n+import logging\n+from datetime import UTC, datetime\n+from typing import Any\n+\n+from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field\n+\n+from auto_client_acquisition.service_catalog import get_offering\n+\n+log = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n+\n+# Tokens that would turn a proposal into a forbidden guarantee (doctrine).\n+_FORBIDDEN_AR = (\"نضمن\", \"ضمان مؤكد\", \"مضمون\")\n+_FORBIDDEN_EN = (\"guarantee\", \"guaranteed\")\n+\n+_DISCLAIMER_AR = \"القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة — Estimated value is not Verified value.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_AR = \"هذا العرض للمراجعة فقط — لن يُرسَل لأي عميل دون موافقة المؤسس.\"\n+_APPROVAL_NOTE_EN = \"This proposal is for review only — will not be sent without founder approval.\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalError(ValueError):\n+    \"\"\"Raised on doctrine violation or empty/invalid selection. Routers map → 400.\"\"\"\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalRequest(BaseModel):\n+    model_config = ConfigDict(extra=\"forbid\")\n+\n+    company_name: str = Field(..., min_length=1)\n+    sector: str = \"b2b_services\"\n+    selected_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)  # e.g. CEO, CFO, CTO, COO\n+    pain_points: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    notes: str = \"\"\n+\n+\n+class ProposalLineItem(BaseModel):\n+    system_id: str\n+    name_ar: str\n+    name_en: str\n+    price_unit: str\n+    setup_sar_min: float\n+    setup_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_min: float | None = None\n+    monthly_sar_max: float | None = None\n+    deliverables: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposal(BaseModel):\n+    proposal_id: str\n+    company_name: str\n+    sector: str\n+    generated_at: datetime = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(UTC))\n+    stakeholders: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    line_items: list[ProposalLineItem]\n+    unknown_system_ids: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)\n+    total_setup_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_setup_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_min: float = 0.0\n+    total_monthly_sar_max: float = 0.0\n+    markdown_ar_en: str = \"\"\n+    is_estimate: bool = True\n+    approval_status: str = \"approval_required\"\n+    governance_decision: str = \"pending\"  # pending | approved | rejected\n+\n+    def to_dict(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\n+        return json.loads(self.model_dump_json())\n+\n+\n+class TransformationProposalGenerator:\n+    \"\"\"Assembles a bilingual transformation proposal from catalog offerings.\"\"\"\n+\n+    def generate(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> TransformationProposal:\n+        self._guard_no_guarantee(req)\n+\n+        if not req.selected_system_ids:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"selected_system_ids is empty — اختر نظامًا واحدًا على الأقل من الكتالوج.\"\n+            )\n+\n+        line_items: list[ProposalLineItem] = []\n+        unknown: list[str] = []\n+        for sid in req.selected_system_ids:\n+            offering = get_offering(sid)\n+            # Only enterprise transformation systems are valid here.\n+            if offering is None or offering.customer_journey_stage != \"transformation\":\n+                unknown.append(sid)\n+                continue\n+            line_items.append(\n+                ProposalLineItem(\n+                    system_id=offering.id,\n+                    name_ar=offering.name_ar,\n+                    name_en=offering.name_en,\n+                    price_unit=offering.price_unit,\n+                    setup_sar_min=offering.price_sar,\n+                    setup_sar_max=offering.price_sar_max,\n+                    monthly_sar_min=offering.price_monthly_sar_min,\n+                    monthly_sar_max=offering.price_monthly_sar_max,\n+                    deliverables=list(offering.deliverables),\n+                )\n+            )\n+\n+        if not line_items:\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"No valid transformation systems selected — \"\n+                f\"unknown ids: {', '.join(unknown) or '(none)'}\"\n+            )\n+\n+        totals = self._totals(line_items)\n+        proposal_id = self._proposal_id(req)\n+        proposal = TransformationProposal(\n+            proposal_id=proposal_id,\n+            company_name=req.company_name,\n+            sector=req.sector,\n+            stakeholders=list(req.stakeholders),\n+            line_items=line_items,\n+            unknown_system_ids=unknown,\n+            **totals,\n+        )\n+        proposal.markdown_ar_en = self._render_markdown(req, proposal)\n+        log.info(\n+            \"transformation_proposal_generated proposal_id=%s company=%s systems=%d\",\n+            proposal_id,\n+            req.company_name,",

_guard_no_guarantee(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> None:\n+        blob = \" \".join([req.notes, *req.pain_points]).lower()\n+        if any(tok in blob for tok in _FORBIDDEN_EN) or in items\n+        )\n+        monthly_min = sum((i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0) for i in items)\n+        monthly_max = sum(\n+            (i.monthly_sar_max if i.monthly_sar_max is not None else (i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0))\n+            for i in items\n+        )\n+        return {\n+            \"total_setup_sar_min\": float(setup_min),\n+            \"total_setup_sar_max\": float(setup_max),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_min\": float(monthly_min),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_max\": float(monthly_max),\n+        }\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _fmt_range(low: float | None, high: float | None) -> str:\n+        if not low and not high:\n+            return \"Custom / مخصص\"\n+        lo = f\"{int(low):,}\" if low else \"0\"\n+        if high is None or high == low:\n+            return f\"{lo} SAR\"\n+        return f\"{lo}–{int(high):,} SAR\"\n+\n+    def _render_markdown(\n+        self, req: TransformationProposalRequest, p: TransformationProposal\n+    ) -> str:\n+        now = p.generated_at.strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d\")\n+        lines: list[str] = [\n+            f\"# عرض التحول — {req.company_name}\",\n+            f\"**Dealix Transformation Proposal self._render_markdown(req, proposal)\n+        log.info(\n+            \"transformation_proposal_generated proposal_id=%s company=%s systems=%d\",\n+            proposal_id,\n+            req.company_name,\n+            len(line_items),\n+        )\n+        return proposal\n+\n+    # ── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n+\n+    def _guard_no_guarantee(self, req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> None:\n+        blob = \" \".join([req.notes, *req.pain_points]).lower()\n+        if any(tok in blob for tok in _FORBIDDEN_EN) or any(\n+            tok in (req.notes + \" \".join(req.pain_points)) for tok in _FORBIDDEN_AR\n+        ):\n+            raise TransformationProposalError(\n+                \"Guaranteed-outcome language is forbidden (no_guaranteed_sales_claims) — \"\n+                \"ممنوع وعود مبيعات مضمونة.\"\n+            )\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _proposal_id(req: TransformationProposalRequest) -> str:\n+        seed = f\"{req.company_name}{req.sector}{datetime.now(UTC).isoformat()}\"\n+        return \"txp_\" + hashlib.sha256(seed.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _totals(items: list[ProposalLineItem]) -> dict[str, float]:\n+        setup_min = sum(i.setup_sar_min for i in items)\n+        # For the ceiling, fall back to the floor when a system has no max (custom).\n+        setup_max = sum(\n+            (i.setup_sar_max if i.setup_sar_max is not None else i.setup_sar_min) for i in items\n+        )\n+        monthly_min = sum((i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0) for i in items)\n+        monthly_max = sum(\n+            (i.monthly_sar_max if i.monthly_sar_max is not None else (i.monthly_sar_min or 0.0))\n+            for i in items\n+        )\n+        return {\n+            \"total_setup_sar_min\": float(setup_min),\n+            \"total_setup_sar_max\": float(setup_max),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_min\": float(monthly_min),\n+            \"total_monthly_sar_max\": float(monthly_max),\n+        }\n+\n+    @staticmethod\n+    def _fmt_range(low: float | None, high: float | None) -> str:\n+        if not low and not high:\n+            return \"Custom / مخصص\"\n+        lo = f\"{int(low):,}\" if low else \"0\"\n+        if high is None or high == low:\n+            return f\"{lo} SAR\"\n+        return f\"{lo}–{int(high):,} SAR\"\n+\n+    def _render_markdown(\n+        self, req: TransformationProposalRequest, p: TransformationProposal\n+    ) -> str:\n+        now = p.generated_at.strftime(\"%Y-%m-%d\")\n+        lines: list[str] = [\n+            f\"# عرض التحول — {req.company_name}\",\n+            f\"**Dealix Transformation Proposal — {req.company_name}**\",\n+            \"\",\n+            f\"المعرف: `{p.proposal_id}` | التاريخ: {now} | الحالة: **يتطلب موافقة المؤسس**\",\n+            f\"ID: `{p.proposal_id}` | Date: {now} | Status: **approval_required**\",\n+            \"\",\n+            f\"القطاع / Sector: {req.sector}\",\n+        ]\n+        if req.stakeholders:\n+            lines.append(f\"أصحاب القرار / Stakeholders: {', '.join(req.stakeholders)}\")\n+        lines += [\n+            \"\",\n+            \"## ملخص تنفيذي / Executive Summary\",\n+            \"\",\n+            \"نصمّم نظام تشغيل أعمال AI-native يحوّل العمليات اليومية إلى workflows \"\n+            \"قابلة للقياس، مرتبطة بالمبيعات والتقارير والحوكمة وتجربة العميل.\",\n+            \"\",\n+            \"We design an AI-native business operating system that turns daily operations \"\n+            \"into measurable workflows wired to sales, reporting, governance, and CX.\",",

.\docs\gtm\whatsapp\WHATSAPP_POST_REPLY_FLOW_AR.md:18:WhatsApp at Dealix is a **post-reply / consent-only** channel. A WhatsApp conversation begins only after a prospect **replies** positively to a founder-approved email and then **asks for**, or explicitly consents to, a WhatsApp follow-up. This mirrors the opt-in gate in [`whatsapp_decision_bot/policy.py`](../../../auto_client_acquisition/whatsapp_decision_bot/policy.py), where `can_ever_live_send()` always returns `False` for this layer and any "broadcast / purchased list / cold whatsapp" pattern is blocked.

.\docs\gtm\FOUNDER_APPROVAL_QUEUE_AR.md:71:This layer's queue does not replace the institutional approval gates; it sits on top of them. The gate registry in [`os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml`](../../os/06_APPROVAL_GATES.yml) forces human approval on high-risk decisions — including the first email to a company (`G01`), follow-ups (`G02`), sharing a price (`G03`), sending a proposal (`G04`), and running any externally-facing automation (`G09`). Approving a draft here means satisfying the relevant gate, never bypassing it. Override authority is founder-only.

.\docs\distribution\PROPOSAL_FACTORY_AR.md:25:| المدة / Timeline | `timeline` | مطابقة لمدة المنتج. / Matches the product's delivery days. |

.\docs\distribution\PROPOSAL_FACTORY_AR.md:34:> تذييل إلزامي في كل عرض يُرسَل للعميل: «القيمة التقديرية ليست قيمة مُتحقَّقة / Estimated value is not Verified value». / Mandatory footer on every customer-facing proposal.
.\docs\distribution\PROPOSAL_FACTORY_AR.md:40:1. **لا عرض بلا عميل مؤهَّل.** يجب أن تكون حالة العميل `proposal_needed` (أو ما بعدها) في [PROSPECT_OS_AR.md](PROSPECT_OS_AR.md). / No proposal without a qualified prospect.
.\docs\distribution\PROPOSAL_FACTORY_AR.md:41:2. **لا سعر نهائي بلا موافقة.** `approval_status` يبقى غير معتمَد حتى موافقة المؤسس على السعر؛ السعر داخل النطاق المعتمد فقط. / No final price without approval; price within the approved band only.
.\docs\distribution\PROPOSAL_FACTORY_AR.md:47:## حالات الموافقة / Approval states (`approval_status`)
.\docs\distribution\PROPOSAL_FACTORY_AR.md:52:| `pending_approval` | في طابور موافقة المؤسس. / In the founder approval queue. |
.\docs\distribution\PROPOSAL_FACTORY_AR.md:54:| `approved` | معتمَد؛ مسموح بالإرسال اليدوي. / Approved; manual send allowed. |
.\docs\distribution\PROPOSAL_FACTORY_AR.md:55:| `sent` | أُرسِل بعد الاعتماد. / Sent after approval. |

.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:7:## What is a proof pack
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:9:A proof pack is a structured record of one claim + its evidence. It exists so:
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:12:- The trust preflight can check the claim.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:19:  "proof_id": "proof_2024_audit_001",
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:29:  "client_logo_used": false,
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:30:  "client_name_used": false,
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:32:  "excerpt": "After 5 days of read-only analysis, the agency identified 12 missed follow-ups...",
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:33:  "supporting_files": ["proof_2024_audit_001.pdf"]
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:41:| L0 | No evidence (placeholder) | Internal draft only. Never for client-facing. |
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:43:| L2 | One case (n=1) | Allowed in proposals, with the limitation stated. |
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:52:| `case_study` | A specific client engagement | "In 5 days we found 12 missed follow-ups." |
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:53:| `benchmark` | Industry data | "The average agency loses 20% of inbound leads." |
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:59:1. **L0/L1 claims are never used in client-facing copy.** They are placeholders.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:62:4. **Client logos** can only be used with written permission (logged in the proof pack).
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:66:8. **Time-bound:** every proof pack has an `expiry_date_iso`. After expiry, re-approve or retire.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:70:1. Sales or founder drafts the proof pack.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:73:4. The pack moves to the proof pack library.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:79:`templates/launch/proof_pack.example.json` is the canonical entry. The full library lives in `data/launch/proof_packs/<proof_id>.json`.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:85:- The draft references the `proof_id` (e.g. "proof_2024_audit_001").
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:86:- The trust preflight verifies the `proof_id` exists in the library.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:87:- The trust preflight verifies the pack is not expired.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:88:- The trust preflight verifies the `evidence_level` is at least L2 for client-facing copy.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:94:- Every new case study = new proof pack.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:95:- Every new benchmark = new proof pack.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:97:- Every retirement of a client = remove the proof pack (or anonymize more).
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:99:## When NOT to use a proof pack
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:101:- In cold outreach. The reader has not earned the right to see proof.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:102:- In a first discovery call. The proof is what you build IN the call.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:103:- In a breakup email. The proof is not the point of a breakup.
.\docs\proposal\PROOF_PACK_TEMPLATE_AR.md:104:- In a pricing message. Pricing is a founder-approved number, not a proof.
